programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy helps families calm their unruly felines, meeting Debbie who is torn between her boyfriend and her incontinent cat Blinkie. Plus, Krisi and Jason want to get married, but standing in their way is her energetic feline Frankie

programme.title: Fish or Die
programme.desc: In Mexico, the crew navigate a maze of crocodile and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons in search of a rumoured paradise for fishing tarpon

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The brothers-in-law are flown to Chicago in a private jet for an unusual job, and a Caribbean restaurant requests an interactive window

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The investigators respond to a report of a dead puppy in a yard, but when they get there they find the animal is still alive and race to save it

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Four baby goats are rushed into the Houston SPCA shelter with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by stray dogs

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: An elderly dog finally gets the chance to have a forever home when a couple from Idaho comes to New Orleans to find a new family member

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: A Russian blue cat that attacks its owners boyfriend, and a ferocious feline whose behaviour is preventing a couples relatives from visiting them

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy comes to the aid of the owners of a feline glutton, and a breast cancer survivor whose aggressive cat is stopping her from moving on with her life

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and the wardens investigate an eagles death. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff helps a remote town that has become overwhelmed with feral cats, a staff members dog needs emergency surgery and Jeff rushes to save a Chihuahua

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: An Irish family wants to nestle a Celtic-themed cottage in a tree, so Pete Nelson devises a design that includes a rain-maker to mimic the wet Irish climate

programme.title: 100 Days Wild
programme.desc: Under pressure to catch a moose, Andrew and Gerrid must also contend with Olivers stubbornness. Later, Adam works on different building projects for base camp

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilcher men reclaim lumber for Shanes cabin, and Eve makes a gruesome discovery. Plus, Atz Lee and Jane find signs of an aggressive bear on the prowl

programme.title: Alaska: Surviving the Last Frontier
programme.desc: Following four groups of ordinary people as they travel into the wilderness of Alaska, where they must find a new home in the inhospitable environment and deal with the threat posed by bears, glaciers and their own fears

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: The Alaska Midnight Sons head towards Denali National Park to investigate one of the tallest and most aggressive Bigfoots they have ever gone after

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: A landowner starts to open the frontier to the outside world, while the locals must brave the extreme weather to hunt big game

programme.title: Speed of Life
programme.desc: Super-slow motion images reveal the intricacies of daily life in the natural world, including a lynx-like cat plucking a bird from the air and a praying mantis seizing its prey

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson travels to Germany in search of a range of different treetop homes, hooking up with his friend and former student Christopher Richter, and meeting Andreas Richter, who has a modern treehouse that sets him apart from the rest

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: A rookie animal carer wins the hearts of everyone at the Houston SPCA centre by performing emergency surgery on a dog that has a rusty metal chain embedded in its neck

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The team receives a report of 50 animals being held at the home of a suspected hoarder in Fayette County, Texas, and sets out to rescue them

programme.title: Scotlands Finest - The Story of the Highland Games
programme.desc: Bill Paterson narrates a documentary exploring the history and characters at the heart of the tests of strength and speed that constitute the Highland Games, beginning in the Fife village of Ceres, which is said to host Scotlands oldest tournament. The film examines how the tradition started as shows of strength and stamina between warring clans, but was changed into a pageant of tartan by Queen Victoria, and is carried on by Scottish communities around the world

programme.title: The Ruth Ellis Files: A Very British Crime Story
programme.desc: In July 1955, Ruth Ellis was the last woman to be hanged in Britain for the cold-blooded murder of lover David Blakely. Gillian Pachter takes a forensic look at the police investigation, and soon discovers worrying assumptions and problematic omissions

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: In the third of the academic quizs first-round matches, four students from Coventry University pit their wits against a team from Cardiff University in a bid to reach the second stage of the competition. Jeremy Paxman asks the questions

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents a quiz show of patience and lateral thinking, where successful contestants make connections between things which at first do not appear to be linked. This episode, two teams of puzzle fanatics do battle, with the Edinburgh Scrabblers taking on the Solent Scrabblers

programme.title: Dam Busters Declassified
programme.desc: Actor Martin Shaw takes to the skies in a bid to separate the facts from the myths surrounding the famous 1943 raid by 617 Squadron, which used bouncing bombs to attack German dams. He also talks to the last living RAFT veteran of the mission, as well as to a survivor of the flooding caused by the breaching of the Moehne dam, and meets the secret wartime girlfriend of pilot Guy Gibson

programme.title: The Great Escaper (2023)
programme.desc: Former Royal Navy officer Bernie Jordan is happily settled with wife Rene at a care home. Unfortunately, he hasnt secured a place on the official British Royal Legion trip to France to the commemorate the 70th anniversary of the D-Day landings. Bernie needs to make the trip to Normandy for personal reasons, and with Renes blessing, he sneaks off to pay his respects. Drama, starring Michael Caine and Glenda Jackson in her final film

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Celia Imrie tells the story of Glenda Jackson, one of Britains greatest acting talents and a double Oscar-winner, who famously turned her back on her screen career to pursue a life in politics. Including interviews and rarely seen moments from the BBC archive, the programme explores Jacksons career, providing an insight into the choices and aspirations that drove her over the years

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs (1991)
programme.desc: Trainee FBI agent Clarice Starling is sent to interview an imprisoned psychopath with a taste for eating his victims. The inmate offers to help catch a serial killer who is holding a politicians daughter hostage - but to learn what he knows, Clarice has to engage in his dangerous mind games. Jonathan Demmes Oscar-winning thriller, based on Thomas Harriss novel, starring Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins, Scott Glenn and Ted Levine

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 8 October 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Pet Shop Boys, Macy Gray, Melanie C, Liam Gallagher and Steve Craddock, Eurythmics, Gabrielle and Eiffel 65

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 15 October 1999. Featuring Eurythmics, Jordan Knight, Macy Gray, The Charlatans, Ann Lee, George Michael, James and Christina Aguilera

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A look back at the career of the Oscar-winning actor through interviews conducted with the BBC. Hopkins talks about his approach to acting, his years as a hellraiser, and the films that helped make him a star, including Remains of the Day, Shadowlands, Nixon, and The Silence of the Lambs, in which he first portrayed his most celebrated character, Dr Hannibal Lecter. Sylvia Syms narrates

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Celia Imrie tells the story of Glenda Jackson, one of Britains greatest acting talents and a double Oscar-winner, who famously turned her back on her screen career to pursue a life in politics. Including interviews and rarely seen moments from the BBC archive, the programme explores Jacksons career, providing an insight into the choices and aspirations that drove her over the years

programme.title: How to Get Ahead
programme.desc: The three-part documentary continues as writer and broadcaster Stephen Smith explores Renaissance Florence under the reign of Grand Duke Cosimo Medici, whose fledgling court prized the finer things in life. Successful courtiers had to have brains as well as brawn, and some looked to theorists like Niccolo Machiavelli for underhand ways to get ahead, while enlightened polymaths turned their minds to the heavens - and to ice-cream

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 8 October 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Pet Shop Boys, Macy Gray, Melanie C, Liam Gallagher and Steve Craddock, Eurythmics, Gabrielle and Eiffel 65

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 15 October 1999. Featuring Eurythmics, Jordan Knight, Macy Gray, The Charlatans, Ann Lee, George Michael, James and Christina Aguilera

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Andy Crane and Jenny Powell host the edition first shown on May 5, featuring performances by Edelweiss, Midnight Oil, Debbie Gibson, Bon Jovi, Roxette, Kylie Minogue, Poison, Live Report, Bangles and Chaka Khan

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates presents an edition first broadcast on May 6 1982, featuring appearances from the Scottish and English World Cup Squads, BA Robertson, Chas and Dave, Junior, Patrice Rushen, Depeche Mode, Tight Fit, Bananarama and Fun Boy Three, and Paul McCartney and Stevie Wonder. Plus, a dance performance by Zoo

programme.title: Whitney at the BBC
programme.desc: Celebrating one of one of soul musics biggest-ever voices with a selection of her songs, illustrating why the world sat up and listened when Whitney Houston burst onto the scene in 1985 with Saving All My Love for You. This playlist traverses the 1980s, 90s and 00s, including Saving All My Love for You, Where Do Broken Hearts Go, How Will I Know and Your Love Is My Love

programme.title: Whitney Houston: Live in South Africa 1994
programme.desc: A concert by the singer at Kings Park Stadium in Durban in 1994, making her the first big western star to visit the newly unified, post-apartheid nation following Nelson Mandelas victory in the presidential election. Featuring performances of Saving All My Love for You, I Wanna Dance with Somebody (Who Loves Me), I Will Always Love You and Greatest Love of All

programme.title: Dusty
programme.desc: Dusty Springfield hosts the entertainment showcase, with her backing band of Madeline Bell, Lesley Duncan and Barbara Moore, while the guests areAmerican vocal quartet the Four Freshmen. First shown in September 1966

programme.title: Genius of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Historian Bettany Hughes investigates the ideas of ancient philosophers, starting with the Indian nobleman Siddhartha Gautama, more popularly known as Buddha. Thought to have been lived and tought between the sixth and fourth centuries BC, the sage and holy man inspired a diverse belief system that influences the lives of millions of people to this day. She travels to India, where the Buddha experienced the challenging ideas and extreme methods of wandering truth seekers, after he had abandoned his family and homeland in the Himalayas to embark on his philosophical quest to find a solution to human suffering

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates presents an edition first broadcast on May 6 1982, featuring appearances from the Scottish and English World Cup Squads, BA Robertson, Chas and Dave, Junior, Patrice Rushen, Depeche Mode, Tight Fit, Bananarama and Fun Boy Three, and Paul McCartney and Stevie Wonder. Plus, a dance performance by Zoo

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Andy Crane and Jenny Powell host the edition first shown on May 5, featuring performances by Edelweiss, Midnight Oil, Debbie Gibson, Bon Jovi, Roxette, Kylie Minogue, Poison, Live Report, Bangles and Chaka Khan

programme.title: Whitney at the BBC
programme.desc: Celebrating one of one of soul musics biggest-ever voices with a selection of her songs, illustrating why the world sat up and listened when Whitney Houston burst onto the scene in 1985 with Saving All My Love for You. This playlist traverses the 1980s, 90s and 00s, including Saving All My Love for You, Where Do Broken Hearts Go, How Will I Know and Your Love Is My Love

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical discussion and expert advice for viewers

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.sub-title: Insurer Wont Help as Our Home Falls Apart
programme.desc: Gloria Hunniford, Louise Minchin and Julia Somerville meet the couple who have been stuck in a battle with their insurer for more than three years over fixing damage to their home caused by subsidence. Plus, the renters waiting for faster broadband because their landlords wont approve the upgrade

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts is in Folkestone, Kent, to visit a two-bedroom maisonette taken on by a builder with an interesting hobby. Tommy Walsh is in Norwich to see a grade II listing with bags of charm and potential, while Dion Dublin is in Wigan, Greater Manchester, to see a three-bedroom terrace riddled with damp but with great development potential

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Danny Sebastian views hundreds of items that once belonged to Arthur Askey, and learns about the actor and comedians glittering career, while Roo Irvine and Caroline Hawley usher the teams round Newark antiques fair

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.desc: A woman in Essex falls victim to a devious scammer who is posing as the payment provider PayPal and all attempts to contact her fail, so the only option is to send in ground interceptors Harriet and Meea to end the scam face to face

programme.title: Attenborough and the Mammoth Graveyard
programme.desc: David Attenborough joins a team of archaeologists and palaeontologists excavating a mammoth graveyard discovered by fossil hunters in the prehistoric riverbed of the Thames. The site has also led to the discovery of stone artefacts, providing an insight into the relationship between early humans and mammoths during the Ice Ages. Leading experts in the fields of evolution provide their insight into this unique vision of prehistoric Britain

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson meets house-hunters who want to raise their children near the sea, so he takes them to view a selection of homes in Devon and Dorset. Away from search, Jules takes to a three-wheeled bicycle as he joins a scheme that helps people to get out and about on the areas beautiful coastline

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a special edition of the high stakes quiz, with pop stars playing to win money for their chosen charities. Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt, Claire Richards from Steps, Eternals Kelle Bryan, and Sugababe Amelle Berrabah must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truth steps and avoiding the lies, earning money for each correct answer

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: It is election day, and Ian and Elaine anxiously await the results, while Max and Cindy celebrate their joint birthday party in Harrys Barn, but tensions grow between him and Linda

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: With the leaderboard closer than ever, the pairs leave Zaamin National Park and race towards the next checkpoint - Kazakhstans largest city, Almaty. The Soviet-era capital is the countrys cultural and financial hub, and to get there, the teams face the choice between two countries - north into Kazakhstan, travelling between major cities, or into Kyrgyzstan, a country rarely visited by western tourists, with remote valleys, alpine lakes and winding mountain roads

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Anna Haugh and Grace Dent present the third quarter-final. The hopefuls begin with an invention test in which they must come up with a brunch dish of their own choosing, making the most of the fresh produce on offer. Then Jimi Famurewa arrives to set them a brief, asking for a dish that uses a nut or nuts of their choice

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers presents a review of the weeks political news, including reports on the latest events at Stormont and Westminster. Plus, comment and analysis with studio guests

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg presents through-the-night results coverage following the elections across England, Scotland and Wales. Reeta Chakrabarti will crunch the numbers and Professor Sir John Curtice, political scientist and professor of politics at the University of Strathclyde, will be on hand to offer his voting knowledge and insight. BBC regional political editors will be at the most important counts, and representatives of the main parties will give their reaction to the emerging political landscape

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rapper Lady Leshurr, author Philippa Perry, broadcaster Alan Titchmarsh and comedian Mike Wozniak join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the comedy quiz show in which a panel of six celebrities fill in the missing blanks and help win some brilliant prizes for some very lucky contestants. This week, he is joined by Joe Marler, Sue Perkins, Trevor Nelson, Josh Pugh, Tasha Ghouri and Sara Barron

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Sophie Raworth takes over the reins, presenting comprehensive coverage of the results of this years English council elections. She will be joined by Kirsty Wark in Edinburgh and Clive Myrie in Cardiff, as the early results for the crucial Holyrood and Senedd elections are also announced. Vicki Young gathers the election data on her giant screen and Professor Sir John Curtice analyses the underlying trends. BBC correspondents reports from the key counts and representatives of the main parties give their reaction to the emerging political landscape

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg returns with extended coverage of the results of this years elections. She has further news of the English council elections, and is joined by Kirsty Wark in Edinburgh and Clive Myrie in Cardiff, as the Holyrood and Senedd election races reach their dramatic conclusions. Reeta Chakrabati rounds up all the key results and Professor Sir John Curtice analyses the underlying trends

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Christian Fraser presents as it becomes clear who has won the elections for the Scottish and Welsh Parliaments, while BBC regional political editors assess the results of the English council elections, with representatives of all the main political parties will giving their reactions

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg and Sophie Raworth present a final round-up, joined by Kirsty Wark in Edinburgh and Clive Myrie in Cardiff as Scotland and Wales digest the results of their national elections. Reeta Chakrabati assesses the key individual results, BBC political editor Chris Mason offer his thoughts on how the elections affect the leadership of the main political parties and Professor Sir John Curtice analyses the new political landscape

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an hour of post-election debate, with a panel of politicians and other guests facing questions from the audience

programme.title: David Attenboroughs 100 Years on Planet Earth
programme.desc: A live event from the Royal Albert Hall paying tribute to the veteran broadcaster on the occasion of his 100th birthday. The show takes the audience on a journey of exploration and discovery through the prism of Sir Davids extraordinary life and career, featuring wildlife stories, reflections from friends, colleagues and admirers, and music from some of his programmes, performed by the BBC Concert Orchestra under the baton of Jerôme Kuhn

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: Bikes!
programme.desc: Stephen Watson presents action from the opening day of action in the annual motorcycle event on a nine-mile course running between Portstewart, Coleraine and Portrush, featuring the Superbike, Supersport and Superstock classes

programme.title: St Denis Medical
programme.sub-title: Get Me in the Pod, Brother
programme.desc: Joyce hires a full-body scanner, but it drives both her and Bruce to distraction. Ron isnt convinced that Alex and Tim tell each other everything, so he calls Alexs bluff

programme.title: St Denis Medical
programme.desc: Ron is annoyed when Bruce cramps his style at a conference. Joyce organises Nurse Appreciation Week- but they dont appreciate it enough

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: Liv hits the beach for her first ever date, while Charles goes sailing. Dianne meets her first match, and Olivias date makes a bold proposition

programme.title: Paddy and Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Paddy Pimblett and Molly McCann, MMA fighters from Liverpool, reflect on the last few months and all their triumphs. Molly and Ellis visit a fertility clinic, and Paddy tries DIY for the first time as the babies are about to arrive

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this documentary following a chimpanzee troop in Senegal. As the dry season sets in, the alpha of the pack, who has ruled unchallenged for the past three years, faces a series of challenges and finds little support from the other apes

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates as a mother puma battels her rivals and tackles her pray, almost three times her size. She must also also endure the wild mountain weather of Patagonia in order to raise her four cubs, which is her biggest litter to date

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: David Attenborough introduces the wildlife of Asias mountains, from elephants living in high altitude tea plantations, to gathering of swifts in Thailands mountainous caves. In Pakistan, markhor fight for mates atop towering cliffs, and in Nepal, the forested foothills of the Himalayas provide hiding places for one of Asias shyest mammals, the red panda

programme.title: Freddie Flintoffs Field of Dreams
programme.desc: As the team struggle to adapt to their new surroundings, Freddie encourages them to embrace the local Indian culture and cuisine. The team rally around Adnan as he struggles with life on tour and their first training session reveals a promising new addition to the squad who could give the team a fighting chance of securing their first victory in India

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The traitors receive a daring secret mission to be executed in plain sight - and if they are not careful, it could blow their cover as the players head into a desolate no mans land to build the prize pot. Presented by Karan Johar

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The game gets tougher as the latest mission forces the players to second-guess their most trusted allies, and as the day unfolds the innocents are left grappling with new theories and suspicions. As a result, new accusations fly at the Circle of Shaq, and old doubts resurface as the players try to uncover who can be trusted. And later, the traitors face a tough choice in the secret tower

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Four people wake up with targets on their backs, fated to be murdered by the end of the day - and the players can save only one. In the mission, the players have to get into the minds of the traitors to answer challenging questions, and later, a long-doubted contestant is dragged back into the spotlight at the Circle of Shaq

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Middlesbrough Pride finds Mam hosting the main stage and booking a Girls Aloud drag tribute act. the event promises to be a banger Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Steph McGovern as herself. alongside Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell, Michelle Visage, Patsy Lowe and Elijah Young

programme.title: We Built a Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary following 19-year-old TikTok star Kyle Thomas as he attempts to build a zoo for exotic species and separate himself from past controversy with animal rights activists. He enlists the help of farmer and builder Phil Hughes and together the pair plan on turning Phils modest petting farm into a world-class sanctuary for unwanted exotic animals

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: Olivia invites her date to meet the family, and Liv shares a passionate moment on the harbour. Dianne ends her first date on a high

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Documentary following pop star Leigh-Anne Pinnock as she confronts her experience as the only black member of Little Mix, and as a black woman in the music industry

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Sian Eleri recounts the story of Helen Duncan, who claimed she could summon the dead. Helen was a Scottish medium, who in 1944 went on trail at the Old Bailey and became the last person convicted and imprisoned under the Witchcraft Act. Sian visits Helens birthplace, Callander, a small town where her childhood premonitions caused fear in the community

programme.title: Freddie Flintoffs Field of Dreams
programme.desc: As the team struggle to adapt to their new surroundings, Freddie encourages them to embrace the local Indian culture and cuisine. The team rally around Adnan as he struggles with life on tour and their first training session reveals a promising new addition to the squad who could give the team a fighting chance of securing their first victory in India

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Attenboroughs Birds of Paradise
programme.desc: Among David Attenboroughs life-long passions are birds of paradise, which he has tracked all over the jungles of New Guinea to film their beautiful and often bizarre displays. In this documentary, he examines how and why these creatures have captivated explorers, naturalists, artists, film-makers and even royalty, investigating the myths surrounding their discovery 500 years ago, the latest extraordinary behaviour captured on camera and the science behind their beauty. He also travels to a state-of-the art facility in Qatar that houses the largest breeding group of these birds in the world

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. James May joins Margaret Calvert, one of Britains road-sign designers, to test-drive the Vauxhall Insignia VXR, and Richard Hammond tries out a £340,000 Lexus supercar. Blues musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A tourist is stabbed whilst travelling down one floor, all alone, in a hotel lift. As the team investigates the victims loved ones, they discover a family with numerous skeletons in their closets - whilst an ominous woman watches everything unfold from the shadows. Meanwhile, an old face returns to St Marie, but isnt met with open arms. Guest starring Ronni Ancona and John Gordon Sinclair

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: A murder mystery event turns into a real crime scene when a famous Welsh actor and TV detective is found stabbed to death at the dinner table. Janies investigation reveals a feud between siblings warring over property and their familys legacy. John rekindles his fledgling romance with the deceaseds sister, but gets a hard lesson in the dangers of living in the past

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: Johns role as a consultant with Mid Wales police is made official, and he and Janie are tasked with solving the murder of a mechanic during a reunion party at Janies old school. Links emerge to DC Chaudhrys recently unearthed cold case, concerning a body uncovered in a drain, and the suicide of Janies teenage best friend 15 years previously

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: The gang learns that its Stewarts birthday. However, he doesnt want them to make a big fuss out of it in case his grandmother or colleagues find out hes gay. The queens therefore come up with a cunning plan. Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell, Patsy Lowe and Elijah Young

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Louise becomes desperate to move in with Janet, but is repeatedly rebuffed, and tries to persuade her by contacting the spirit of Jonny in a suspicious seance. Donna comes to the conclusion that her slightly camp boss Tim is homosexual, even though he is happily married with children, and resolves to help him come out of the closet

programme.title: Attenboroughs Birds of Paradise
programme.desc: Among David Attenboroughs life-long passions are birds of paradise, which he has tracked all over the jungles of New Guinea to film their beautiful and often bizarre displays. In this documentary, he examines how and why these creatures have captivated explorers, naturalists, artists, film-makers and even royalty, investigating the myths surrounding their discovery 500 years ago, the latest extraordinary behaviour captured on camera and the science behind their beauty. He also travels to a state-of-the art facility in Qatar that houses the largest breeding group of these birds in the world

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Disturbed by a recording of what appears to be a spirit voice and accounts of the late medium Helen Duncan summoning physical spirit forms, Sian Eleri focuses on evidence from those who believe this apparent seance to be fake. Searching for answers and hoping to understand how Helen was convincing people they were communicating with their dead loved ones, Sian tracks down a modern-day medium. He claims to commune with the other side, but a seance in Edinburgh leaves Sian with more questions than she first started with

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. programme.title: See Hear
programme.desc: Examining deaf creators online, revealing the highs, lows and realities of social media life, from viral success and community connection to pressure and criticism

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: A fresh set of hopeful home cooks arrive in the MasterChef kitchen, where another four aprons are up for grabs. To get hold of one they must prove they have the culinary skills as they serve up their signature dishes and a decadent dessert - a task made more difficult as the recipe doesnt include timings. The best of the bunch get the chance to cook for former champions Tom Rhodes, Ping Coombes and Kenny Tutt, before Grace Dent and Anna Haugh choose the quarter-finalists

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Mairead and the lads take the family car on a road trip to pick up her unpredictable mother, but disaster strikes. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy, Chris Walley and Hilary Rose

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Sun and sand are the new dream, but the lads cannot afford it, until Billy Murphy turns up with a daring heist idea. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy, Chris Walley and Shane Casey

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Its Humphreys last day as detective inspector, and the whole team is eagerly awaiting the towns annual pirate festival. Danger, however, is ahoy when Geraldine Desais nautical exhibition goes up in smoke, leading to the ancient treasure map of pirate Elias Cutler going missing amid the chaos. On the trail of the missing map, Humphrey soon has suspicions when he discovers that Geraldine has been selling her memorabilia to pay for her husbands care and recently had the map revalued. Drama, starring Kris Marshall

programme.desc: Joanna Page heads to the seaside resort of Eastbourne, and meets siblings David and Theresa. They battle to raise money for the charity DKMS, gambling on designer fashion, vintage finds and bold upcycled pieces

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michaels South Korean railway journey continues in Seoul. Travelling across one of the worlds largest metro systems, he heads south to Suwon to visit Samsungs headquarters. Touring a futuristic smart home, Michael explores how innovation now shapes everyday life

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don is busy, as the garden bursts into colour. Woody herbs such as thyme and sage dont thrive in his clay soil, so hes sowing seeds to ensure a steady supply. Carol Klein proves that small can be both beautiful and delicious, creating a modest border devoted to vegetables and weaving it together with flowers, to provide year round colour

programme.title: Lightning

Their communal areas are in desperate need of some attention - the overcrowded living room needs seating and storage solutions, the recycling area is overflowing and the downstairs wet room proves a cleaning challenge for Maxine Dwyer

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Dominant male lions Big Toe and Madumo disappear after fighting intruders, leaving the family exposed, with sub-adult males Colin and Ngkonne coming of age, but not yet big enough to challenge intruders. Greg Hartman follows Xudum the leopard as she strays into dangerous territory looking for a mate, while local film-maker Rea Schulte to Brinke finds Pobe the cheetahs daughter

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the first of two visits to Royal Holloway college in Surrey, members of the team value a collection of miniature paintings depicting West Indian planters, a selection of costume designs rescued from a dustbin, and a walking stick that once belonged to the singer Enrico Caruso

programme.desc: From the Bowes Museum at Barnard castle in County Durham, which was purpose-built to house the collection of Josephine and John Bowes

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos journey continues in Busan, South Koreas second city, on the countrys south eastern coast. On the seafront at Haeundae Beach, he boards the Sky Capsule monorail along a former coastal railway route, reimagined as a scenic ride above the shoreline. Later, he heads to Jeonju, where he meets a craftsman producing paper

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Andrew and dad Terrence are spinning plates on the farm and with their glamping pods just as Gayle is giving birth to the newest member of the Glenn family. Long days working on the dairy shed build and an infection in his leg mean Adam is desperate for a new prosthetic, while Ally and fellow crofters set sail to the volcanic Shiant islands, where they must navigate steep cliffs to find and shear sheep

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the natural history series, in which David Attenborough looks at life on each of the seven continents, revealing how each distinct land mass has shaped the creatures found there and the many challenges faced by animals in a modern world dominated by humans

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy uncovers the story of Edward IVs sons Edward and Richard, whose disappearance in 1483 has led to centuries of mystery. The princes were taken to the Tower of London for their own protection, but a priest declared the boys illegitimate and their uncle Richard next in line to the throne. The gaps in the historical record have fuelled 500 years of speculation, so Lucy speaks to history professor Tim Thornton, who has found evidence of one account of what happened written by Thomas More, while Richard III Society chair Matthew Lewis gives his views on the events

programme.title: Peelers: The PSNI for Real
programme.desc: Acting on a tip-off, the Peelers storm a city centre flat on a drugs bust. Inside, a suspect is startled, cuffed and arrested. Outside, the PSNI team search the nearby streets for the suspected big-time dealer they think may have fled the scene with more drugs. In Belfast city centre, police attempt to arrest a man who refuses to comply with a search and the situation quickly escalates

programme.desc: At the Western General Hospital, 48-year-old Alastair has a rare penis cancer that requires a partial amputation. programme.title: Shadow in the Cloud (2020)

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The designers take over a medieval-style castle hotel where they are tasked with turning bedrooms into perfect love nests, drawing on their own ideas of what makes a romantic retreat for inspiration. programme.desc: Jonathan Pratt and Irita Marriott guide the teams at Uttoxeter Racecourse, while in Llangollen, Christina Trevanion quizzes passers-by about a mystery object

programme.desc: Having lived in the same house virtually all her life, a ukulele-playing buyer has £280,000 to relocate to south-west Wales. Briony May Williams is tasked with helping her to find the perfect property which also needs to accommodate an entourage of animals including a dog, two cats, three parrots, some chickens and thousands of bees

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

Plus, a curious stoneware mug, an unloved vase, and a painting bought for less than £1 that turns out to be worth considerably more

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: People are invited to try to make money out of their antiques by taking a risk at auction. Paul Martin presents

programme.title: Mary Berry - Cook and Share
programme.desc: Mary journeys to some of the places closest to her heart, sharing memories from her past and creating new ones, while inspiring those she meets along the way with delicious recipes. Here Mary works behind the scenes at an Indian wedding, helping the caterers pull-off a huge event that feeds 400 people from morning to night, and adding a recipe of her own to the menu. Blown away by the traditions, customs and vibrancy of the wedding, Mary takes time to reflect on her own special day

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his journey, Michael Portillo travels to South Koreas south west, where food, protest and landscape reveal the values that have shaped the modern nation. Arriving by high-speed train in Gwangju, he explores the regions deep-rooted food culture. Later, the presenter confronts a darker chapter in South Koreas history at the May 18th Memorial Park. Leaving the mainland, Michael crosses by ferry to Jeju Island, a volcanic landscape dominated by Mount Halla

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games

programme.desc: The team visits the RHS Malvern Spring Festival in Worcestershire, where Rachel de Thame and Joe Swift share everything the show has to offer. Gardens, plants and expert advice, as well as tips and tricks to try at home. There is a visit to the Devon-Somerset border to meet a grower who, along with the help of a couple of feathered friends, has transformed a woodland landscape into a stunning nursery. And one designer explains why she is creating her first show to demonstrate the art of pressing flowers

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Planting borders and planning for cut flowers are on Lizzie Schofield and Brian Cunninghams to-do list at Beechgrove Garden. Lizzie is direct sowing in the new cuttings garden, while Brian is in the zig-zag border planting varieties that will grow tall, and so are ideal for the back of a plot, but that dont require support or staking. Brian also kicks off this years collection of plants being cultivated in the 6x8 glasshouse, while Lizzie is the first of the presenters to start work in her competition plot. Plus, a report on the alpine collection at the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Tall and confident army sergeant Paul is paired with Natalie, a former girl band member who usually goes for a very different kind of man. Will she fall for his charm? Kerry, a forensic psychologist, is on her first date since losing her hearing five years ago. She meets Dan, a gentle police officer, who may just be the kind of man she can open up to. And 80-something Dave is still chasing love after three divorces. He hopes his enthusiasm - and his love of weightlifting - will impress elegant widow Clare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amys Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: To avenge her mothers death, a young woman named Pixie masterminds a heist. However, she must flee across Ireland from gangsters, take on the patriarchy, and choose her own destiny along the way. Crime comedy, starring Olivia Cooke, Fra Fee and Rory Fleck Byrne

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is a critical front line in Americas war on drugs. As the US pours billions into military operations across the Caribbean - to seize the former President of Venezuela, and intercept drug shipments - federal agents on the island are stepping up raids against powerful gangs. Reporter Guillermo Galdos joins the Drug Enforcement Agency and police on high-risk operations in San Juan, where major arrests and drug seizures reveal the scale of the trade

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners in Berkshire take part in the dinner party competition, hoping to secure the £1,000 prize. First to host are Toots and Jamie, whose eccentric menu reflects their unconventional approach to life. Next, German-born Kat and RAF air cadet trainer Scott throw a military-themed bash, before its the turn of self-confessed perfectionist Kevin and his partner Clare, who have confidence in their foodie menu

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: The property expert follows city people embracing fresh starts in beautiful rural retreats. Here, James tackles his master bedroom as he renovates his home into a holiday rental. He then starts to consider how to market it

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang go over to Sams to watch The Magnificent Seven, but accidentally leave Diane out of their plans - and feel so guilty they decide to take her to the opera instead. Unfortunately, she is overwhelmed by all the attention and mistakenly believes Sam is responsible

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam hires a new member of staff who proves popular with colleagues and customers alike, making Woody fear his days at the bar are numbered. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of three. When councilwoman Janet Eldridge visits the bar during her re-election campaign, Sam is smitten, so a jealous Diane joins the opposition to save him from the politicians dubious charms. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the familys Roman holiday continues, Robert falls in love with sultry local beauty Stefania (Alex Meneses), who works in an ice-cream shop

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank accidentally crash their car through the wall of Rays house, causing a bitter family dispute - and forcing Debra into the role of peacemaker. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert believes Amy is the woman of his dreams and decides to tell her the truth about Joanne and Stefania, but she is so shocked by the confession that she refuses to take him back

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier decide to collaborate on a self-help book about sibling relationships. After struggling to write it they lock themselves in a hotel room until it is finished, but petty jealousy reigns and the Crane brothers are soon at each others throats

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Food critic Gil takes over the radio show to cover for an ailing Frasier - who immediately fears his job is under threat and resolves to get back on air without delay. Comedy, starring Edward Hibbert and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles meets his brother at Cafe Nervosa, where Frasier reflects on his first year in Seattle - and whether he is actually happy with his life in the city. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink reads a steamy novel written by an old acquaintance from Boston - and discovers his teenage affair with a piano teacher has found its way into the plot. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Buckinghamshire, where their restorations include a pair of manhole covers, a water pump and a beehive

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles
programme.desc: Matt meets a family whose generations have been drawn back to Northern Irelands most northerly tip to spend their days combining a love of native breed horses and of their homeland. Matt also heads to Falkirk to meet the people dedicated to caring for two of Scotlands manmade wonders, the 100-feet-high Kelpies and the Falkirk Wheel - the worlds only rotating boat lift

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman meets Allie and Cliff who are looking to buy a new permanent residence on the Greek island of Crete with a budget of £240,000

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Irish dance teacher Sarah has the busiest day of her school year - St Patricks Day - as she shows off her students talents all over town, including at the very bar where she met her husband, Scott. Can she combine a hectic dance routine with her own wedding celebration? Its a busy day for Kay Rawlins too, as she counts down to kick-off in her job as founder of one of the biggest soccer clubs in the USA. But she hasnt forgotten her roots in Stoke. Donna and Dan pay a surprise visit to their teenage son Oliver as he works poolside in his summer job at one of the most famous hotels in Florida - the Don CeSar - where his parents spent their first holiday together over 30 years ago

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Brittany, Donna and Paul return to the basement of their five-storey home, and the race is on to install the final windows and seal the rear façade before the elements take over. At Château de la Grillère, Tim and Sharon are desperate to open their doors to guests, but with a first-floor suite unfinished, a window seat to build and wasps in the chimney, everything is against them

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Shaun Garner are feeling the pressure after a sudden run of sales leaves them short on properties and forces them to pull out all the stops for artists Declan and Claudia. Away from the viewings, the Garners try a bold new approach to marketing - with chaotic results. Meanwhile, in Murcia, Natalie and Darren Brown meet recently retired John and Siobhan from Ireland, who are ready to find a forever home in the sun, with space for visiting grandkids top of the list

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: Pauls nostalgic railway journey continues in Wales, where he takes to the footplate of steam and diesel locomotives to get to a sheep market, then rides an ultra-modern signal-less line to watch majestic ospreys. He is put to work servicing a slate-hauling steam train in the birthplace of Thomas the Tank Engine, before a ride in a small locomotive, like the ones that were used to transport tea in India, to experience the quirky beauty of Portmeirion

programme.title: Taskmaster

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans brings his entertainment show back to Channel 4 in a more intimate format, featuring interviews with the biggest stars and music by the latest bands from the presenters studio at Virgin Radio UK

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The course enters the high-stakes Dating Phase. Guided by experts, the virgins learn to escalate and navigate consent. Tegan is tested by her struggles with self-acceptance, and Ellens extreme anxiety makes her question if dating is for her. Alex has a breakthrough in an intimate session with Ilil, and for two members of the group, sparks begin to fly for real during dating practice

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The nudity phase begins, giving the group members a chance to confront body insecurities and become more familiar with their anatomy. Katie faces painful memories of bullying, Bertie is keen to have his first kiss and Tegan takes a major step towards intimacy with Risdon, experiencing connection through touch like never before

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleones, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chefs own taste test proves the opposite. With Petes wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Lancashire couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Laidback Howard and his wife Lisa kick things off but fail to impress everyone with their lacklustre menu, before Michael and Jennis evening leaves guests bored with table talk of transport, bemused by a collection of model busses, and repulsed by a rogue hair in the starter dish. Finally, Luke and Louise deliver a polished performance, which is let down by an over-cooked main course, before the winning couple is revealed

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Gary and Annette plan their dream country home, while Dannie and Grace research activities for another new learning zone on their family farm

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray accidentally kills Allys pet hamster while the kids are away from home for the weekend, so Debra insists they give it a dignified funeral. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is promoted to lieutenant, much to the dismay of Ray, who feels overshadowed and becomes convinced his own prestige is suffering as a result. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes to a wedding, where he finds himself regretting a missed opportunity to escort a high-school date to her door, and is tormented by thoughts of what might have been. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Eddie impregnates a neighbours dog, so Frasier decides to have him neutered. However, the elusive mutt has no intention of accepting his fate and flees into the city. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink arranges a date for Daphne with his new radio station manager - unaware he is gay. Comedy, guest starring Eric Lutes, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to prepare himself for the demands of fatherhood - but soon realises that carrying a 10lb bag of flour around the city streets is no substitute for a real baby. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier attend the closing of Martins favourite bar, but are shocked to discover it is being demolished by a company they have invested in. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole are in Gloucestershire, where they upcycle a horse yoke, a hay trailer and a fertiliser funnel

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles
programme.desc: Matt joins a band of people travelling to Scotlands wild places to preserve the buildings. And finally, Matt weaves his way to Portadown to meet the man whose family founded the nations oldest carpet company, which today supplies the finest establishments in the world and lays the groundwork for kings and queens

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson meets Julie and Amanda, who have holidayed in France many times and love the countryside, the culture and the weather. With their teenage children heading to university, they want to find a holiday home where they can unwind and relax, and maybe make a permanent move to in the future. Theyve settled on Lot-et-Garonne, with its gorgeous countryside punctuated by beautiful villages and medieval towns, and 120 miles of waterways. Jean lines up five options for their budget of £120,000, from a riverside townhouse to a characterful stone house with land aplenty

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: In Orlando at the Best of British pub, owner Martin sees if his mad ideas have paid off. Its been open for five months now, and a journalist comes to review its famous fish and chips, but is the pub a success with Brits and Americans alike? Its walkies for Sarah, her husband Scott and their two-year-old daughter Sorcha, who step in when staff dont turn up to the dog walking business which has 2,000 dogs on its books. Anthony Fothergill and his wife Mitchelle are going back into business with their catering venture that they put on hold while Mitchelle battled cancer. An exciting day awaits, as they prepare a tasting menu for a very important bunch of Florida-based Brits

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jon and Carmen prepare a bespoke wedding aisle for their big day and, with a baby on the way, Anna and Maxime begin renovating their new family château

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Sarah find a place in a lively location, while in Murcia, Darren and Natalie guide Paul through the search for a home for his family of three

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks
programme.desc: Chris Packham joins Alexander on an excursion in Kent, where they hunt for lost treasure, encounter Spitfires and a boat graveyard, explore battlefields, castles and the rich natural environment, and uncover historical secrets. Chris talks openly about some of his struggles and difficulties, while Alexander speaks movingly about his own experiences with his sons autism

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Its a family affair at the restaurant as Freds parents come for lunch. Twenty-six-year-old Jordan arrives for a double date with his mum Kelly. Jordan hits it off with Aimee, but will mum watching from afar throw them off? Kellys date is with carpenter and triathlete John, while Ukrainian single mum Kateryna meets warm-hearted Peter, and sparks fly over shared values, laughter and a few heartfelt toasts in Ukrainian

programme.title: Oblivion (2013)
programme.desc: A repairman is assigned to salvage the remaining resources from Earth, which has been left a devastated wasteland after a war with an alien race. He discovers a human survivor on the surface of the planet, an encounter that exposes secrets from the past that threaten the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics - but even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs

programme.title: Good Boys (2019)
programme.desc: Three lads skip school and embark on an epic journey while carrying stolen drugs. They are hunted by teenage girls, and attempt to make their way home in time for a long-awaited party. Director Gene Stupnitskys comedy, starring Jacob Tremblay, Keith L Williams and Brady Noon

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randys hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian David ODoherty joins presenter Joe Lycett in Málaga, on Spains Costa del Sol for a fast and funny two-day trial of the best the Costa has to offer. They head to the citys oldest bar, where wine is poured directly from 100-year-old barrels, then enjoy a walk along the Caminito del Rey footpath, which clings to the side of a cliff face 100 metres up. Their next attraction is the International Museum of Nativity Scene Art in the small town of Mollina, while back in Málaga itself, they learn how to cook the perfect sardine before visiting the birthplace of painter and sculptor Pablo Picasso

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The course enters the high-stakes Dating Phase. Guided by experts, the virgins learn to escalate and navigate consent. Tegan is tested by her struggles with self-acceptance, and Ellens extreme anxiety makes her question if dating is for her. Alex has a breakthrough in an intimate session with Ilil, and for two members of the group, sparks begin to fly for real during dating practice

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amys Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: To avenge her mothers death, a young woman named Pixie masterminds a heist. However, she must flee across Ireland from gangsters, take on the patriarchy, and choose her own destiny along the way. Crime comedy, starring Olivia Cooke, Fra Fee and Rory Fleck Byrne

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is a critical front line in Americas war on drugs. As the US pours billions into military operations across the Caribbean - to seize the former President of Venezuela, and intercept drug shipments - federal agents on the island are stepping up raids against powerful gangs. Reporter Guillermo Galdos joins the Drug Enforcement Agency and police on high-risk operations in San Juan, where major arrests and drug seizures reveal the scale of the trade

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners in Berkshire take part in the dinner party competition, hoping to secure the £1,000 prize. First to host are Toots and Jamie, whose eccentric menu reflects their unconventional approach to life. Next, German-born Kat and RAF air cadet trainer Scott throw a military-themed bash, before its the turn of self-confessed perfectionist Kevin and his partner Clare, who have confidence in their foodie menu

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: The property expert follows city people embracing fresh starts in beautiful rural retreats. Here, James tackles his master bedroom as he renovates his home into a holiday rental. He then starts to consider how to market it

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang go over to Sams to watch The Magnificent Seven, but accidentally leave Diane out of their plans - and feel so guilty they decide to take her to the opera instead. Unfortunately, she is overwhelmed by all the attention and mistakenly believes Sam is responsible

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam hires a new member of staff who proves popular with colleagues and customers alike, making Woody fear his days at the bar are numbered. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of three. When councilwoman Janet Eldridge visits the bar during her re-election campaign, Sam is smitten, so a jealous Diane joins the opposition to save him from the politicians dubious charms. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the familys Roman holiday continues, Robert falls in love with sultry local beauty Stefania (Alex Meneses), who works in an ice-cream shop

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank accidentally crash their car through the wall of Rays house, causing a bitter family dispute - and forcing Debra into the role of peacemaker. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert believes Amy is the woman of his dreams and decides to tell her the truth about Joanne and Stefania, but she is so shocked by the confession that she refuses to take him back

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier decide to collaborate on a self-help book about sibling relationships. After struggling to write it they lock themselves in a hotel room until it is finished, but petty jealousy reigns and the Crane brothers are soon at each others throats

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Food critic Gil takes over the radio show to cover for an ailing Frasier - who immediately fears his job is under threat and resolves to get back on air without delay. Comedy, starring Edward Hibbert and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles meets his brother at Cafe Nervosa, where Frasier reflects on his first year in Seattle - and whether he is actually happy with his life in the city. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink reads a steamy novel written by an old acquaintance from Boston - and discovers his teenage affair with a piano teacher has found its way into the plot. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Buckinghamshire, where their restorations include a pair of manhole covers, a water pump and a beehive

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles
programme.desc: Matt meets a family whose generations have been drawn back to Northern Irelands most northerly tip to spend their days combining a love of native breed horses and of their homeland. Matt also heads to Falkirk to meet the people dedicated to caring for two of Scotlands manmade wonders, the 100-feet-high Kelpies and the Falkirk Wheel - the worlds only rotating boat lift

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman meets Allie and Cliff who are looking to buy a new permanent residence on the Greek island of Crete with a budget of £240,000

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Irish dance teacher Sarah has the busiest day of her school year - St Patricks Day - as she shows off her students talents all over town, including at the very bar where she met her husband, Scott. Can she combine a hectic dance routine with her own wedding celebration? Its a busy day for Kay Rawlins too, as she counts down to kick-off in her job as founder of one of the biggest soccer clubs in the USA. But she hasnt forgotten her roots in Stoke. Donna and Dan pay a surprise visit to their teenage son Oliver as he works poolside in his summer job at one of the most famous hotels in Florida - the Don CeSar - where his parents spent their first holiday together over 30 years ago

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Brittany, Donna and Paul return to the basement of their five-storey home, and the race is on to install the final windows and seal the rear façade before the elements take over. At Château de la Grillère, Tim and Sharon are desperate to open their doors to guests, but with a first-floor suite unfinished, a window seat to build and wasps in the chimney, everything is against them

programme.desc: Three lads skip school and embark on an epic journey while carrying stolen drugs. They are hunted by teenage girls, and attempt to make their way home in time for a long-awaited party. Director Gene Stupnitskys comedy, starring Jacob Tremblay, Keith L Williams and Brady Noon

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randys hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian David ODoherty joins presenter Joe Lycett in Málaga, on Spains Costa del Sol for a fast and funny two-day trial of the best the Costa has to offer. They head to the citys oldest bar, where wine is poured directly from 100-year-old barrels, then enjoy a walk along the Caminito del Rey footpath, which clings to the side of a cliff face 100 metres up. Their next attraction is the International Museum of Nativity Scene Art in the small town of Mollina, while back in Málaga itself, they learn how to cook the perfect sardine before visiting the birthplace of painter and sculptor Pablo Picasso

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is upstaged by superior public speaker Ross while giving the toast at a wedding anniversary party for their parents - who cause outrage by asking pregnant Rachel to pretend she is married. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son embark a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, aiming to experience extremes from the fiery heat of the Mediterranean to the icy tundras of the Arctic Circle. They begin in Croatia, where they swing off the roof of Hajduk Splits football stadium, before diving headfirst into the crystal-clear waters of the Adriatic. The action continues when the pair go head-to-head on aqua bikes alongside a former world champion, before heading to the capital Zagreb to meet a young inventor, who stuns them with his electric creation

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Hungary, where they take to the open waters of Lake Balaton for a spot of high-speed catamaran sailing with an Olympic crew, before warming up in their RV with some goulash. The pair finish in the capital Budapest, where Barney has arranged to meet a world-famous escapologist

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachels labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Phoebe and Joey agree to find dates for each other and Rachels paediatrician drops her from his list of clients because she keeps pestering him about Emma

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebes Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebes birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. Meanwhile, Ross creates a domestic crisis by locking himself and Rachel out of the flat - with Emma inside. Directed by and starring David Schwimmer, with Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachels decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebes love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Other Sister
programme.desc: Rachels sister Amy joins the gang for Thanksgiving, and Monica worries about her best china getting damaged. Meanwhile, Joey forgets to turn up for the Days of Our Lives cast float. Guest starring Christina Applegate

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
programme.desc: Chandler feels glum at having to spend Christmas in Tulsa, so a workmate stays behind to keep him company. Unfortunately, she ends up making a pass at him, prompting him to take drastic action and quit his job altogether. Guest starring Selma Blair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel visits work to show off her baby and immediately clashes with the temp standing in for her, convinced he is trying to steal her job. Phoebe causes havoc on the set of Joeys TV show, while Chandler and Monica reconsider starting a family. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.title: Friends
