Mum-of-two Emma, 47, is all glammed up and ready to play the love lottery, but Cupid throws a huge surprise her way, and when the man who broke her heart walks through the door the drama begins

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities arrive on Tenerife and settle into a luxury villa. Gabby Allen dates gym-owner Karl, while David Potts heads out for a spicy dinner with fireman Tomasz

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire celebrate Valentines Day a little early with their traditional role-play, meaning the return of Clive and Julianna. But all romantic plans are put on hold when an unexpected turn lands Claire in hospital. Meanwhile, Jays attempt to spend some time alone with Gloria is interrupted by a series of distractions, while Cam and Mitch throw a party for all their single friends - only to end up with shocking hangovers and a new room-mate

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch cleans up Lindseys dirty devils, Uzzi removes Laras unsuitably placed sheep, and Alice eradicates Sophies shoddy skate tattoo

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Kiell Smith-Bynoe plays bingo without any shoes on. Mae Martin plays an unusual but potentially brilliant drum solo. And the comedians create boats to carry eggs in a race

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy version of the words-and-numbers game, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by Josie Long and Rob Beckett. Vic Reeves waxes lyrical in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Joe Wilkinson turns up once more to assist Rachel Riley at the board

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gary Findley, Chief Executive Officer of Restoration 1, a self-described Redneck CEO from Texas, goes undercover to ensure that there are no flaws in the playbook of the company that would negatively impact all the franchises

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Paul Damico, the former president and CEO, Round Table Pizza goes undercover to glean effective ways to expand the long-standing West Coast pizza franchise eastward and attract a younger clientele. Damico credits the valuable brand insights he garnered on Undercover Boss USA in 2013, when he was president of Moes Southwest Grill, as a reason to go back undercover

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs?In Nashville, Jonathan helps to spruce up the property when Kim and Tims garden needs a trim. Drew wants to find their dream home, but can he manage the tricky challenge of finding more for less?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In east Lancashire, newly engaged Andrew and Sue offer a menu of classic tried and tested dishes. Joining them are laid back Ben and Ruth, and drama lovers Helen and Victoria. Day two sees Ben and prankster Ruth host. Although their breakfast theme intrigues their guests, will it be dinner party standard? Finally, its the turn of drama teacher Helen, and saleswoman by day, singer by night, Victoria, to show the competition how its really done

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three dinner parties in West Yorkshire, including one held by glamorous couple Katie and Neil, who kick the competition off with a meal almost as beautifully presented as they are

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple with two daughters seek help in funding their impending nuptials. In the presence of a lawyer, would-be bride Katie agrees to hand control over planning the event to prospective husband Darnell, who is given £12,000 to put together the perfect wedding

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A Hindu couple from Leicester who have ploughed all their savings into an ice-cream business seek help in paying for their wedding. With funds of £12,000 on the line, the groom-to-be agrees to the shows condition that he organises the occasion alone. However, his unusual planning style gives his future wife cause for concern

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Lorne Abony, the CEO and chairman of in-store media provider Mood Media, goes undercover in one of the fastest growing companies in America. Adopting a disguise in his own business, he finds out how efficiently it is functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jim Rogers, chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America, goes undercover within his own company to discover whether his employees share his boy-scout philosophy. However, Jims wife Sandy fears his naturally outgoing and cheerful nature could undo his cover story as a recently unemployed reality show contestant

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their fathers eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldnt replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival duos compete in Cardiff to host the best dinner party. Newlyweds Laura and Sean kick off the week with a Hawaiian feast. Then, Lesley and Keith host, with Lesley wanting to glam things up a bit with some posh nosh. However, their starter incites some pungent punditing. Laura wows the table with a wedding rendition, and the tale of the missing finger points to Keith. On the final night, everyone is looking forward to Rachel and Lees curry, but they confound expectations by fusing traditional with different flavours

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen gets involved with a rock band, Douglas becomes a spaceologist and Roys life is transformed when he injures his back. Office comedy, starring Katherine Parkinson, Matt Berry and Chris ODowd

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Roy becomes obsessed with his latest girlfriends sad family history, while Jen tells a lie to get attention. Comedy, starring Chris ODowd, Matt Berry, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Warren Boone, the chief people officer of restaurant chain Cocos Bakery, steps off the corporate ladder to go undercover on the front line. He sees how some huge decisions - including laying off 50% of the workforce - have changed the working lives of staff on the shop floor

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The Mayor of Fontana Acquanetta Warren gets her hands dirty in the sewers, helps with the rubbish in the parks and works with the fire brigade to see where the city needs help as people recover from the pandemic

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Kylah and Jons schedule causes as much chaos as their home does. As the brothers begin changing their builder-basic finish, the couple must make a decision - either increase the search area, lower the budget or change their wish list. As the work begins, the couple must make a decision - either increase the search area, lower the budget or change their wish list

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Married couple Rachel and Matt kick off the competition in Nottinghamshire with a hearty menu. Fun-loving Mark makes a big first impression, and his wife Debbie is the butt of most of his jokes, while final couple Sam and Paula are taken aback, but it remains to be seen who will win the £1,000 after all players have delivered their dishes

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, drama producers Henry and Tom are first to host with a traditional British menu. The second dinner party, hosted by design-loving Vinnie and Tanz, sees three types of lamb, while the hosts for the final evening are Shahab and Asia, who try to impress their foodie guests with a globally inspired menu that divides opinion. Whose soiree will secure the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party animal Jonny is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Ayca the wedding of her dreams, while the bride relinquishes control of the big day in the presence of a lawyer

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A couple whose determination to marry was strengthened by the birth of their daughter are given £12,000 to fund their wedding. Groom-to-be Luke is given sole responsibility for planning the nuptials, but must first prove he is up to the challenge, as well as learn to appreciate the importance of fiancee Laurens faith

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: President of Moes Southwest Grill, Paul Damico, goes undercover to check the standards he values are still being met. The company is one of the worlds fastest growing restaurant chains with 10,000 employees and Paul wants to look for opportunities to assist his staff in a similar way to how his family were helped by his fathers bosses during his childhood

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf goes undercover among the workforce of restaurant chain Boston Market, where she is chief brand officer. Disguising herself as an out-of-work waitress trying to win the chance to open up her own eatery by taking part in a bogus reality TV show, she tries to revive the companys image by learning more about its staff

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs?Empty nesters Lisa and Dave want to downsize, but still want enough room for both entertaining and Lisas work-from-home business. So, when the couple extend their budget, Drew has fun finding their dream home, including finding a space for an in-home spa. Will his efforts produce a spa-tecular place?Short:Empty nesters Lisa and Dave want to downsize, but still want enough room for both entertaining and Lisas business. So, when the couple extend their budget, Drew has fun finding their dream home

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Cardiff couples compete to win £1,000 by throwing the perfect dinner part. First-time hosts Abi and Jake plan an American-themed menu. Their home-made fare impresses most of their guests, and their special effort for vegan couple Ashleigh and Jack is really appreciated. On night two, passionate vegans Ashleigh and Jack serve a fully plant-based menu designed to satisfy even the most committed meat eaters, but their rivals arent convinced that they can be converted. On the final night, Karen and James are confident a more traditional menu will show the youngsters how its done

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Contenders Frankie Boyle, Ivo Graham, Jenny Eclair, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Mae Martin continue to address the challenges set for them. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After a mould issue at home forces Erica and Geoff to stay at the Goldbergs, Beverly senses tensions in their marriage and seizes the opportunity to impart a little marital advice

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family

Bus driver Tommy and electrician Luke both agree they hate dating apps and hook-up culture. However, Luke then learns something about Tommy that leaves their date hanging by a thread. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with an extreme eating show and somehow, that ends up with him getting chased by the mob when a stew recipe is stolen from Fat Tony

programme.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches, but now its time for the real drama - getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved

programme.desc: Twenty-six-year-old graphic designer Charlie says that some people describe her optimism as relentless. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Sarah from Plymouth becomes the first returning picker having previously been on the show as David. Twenty-year-old plumber Jamie from Swansea is fed up with being hit on by OAPs at work, he comes into the studio looking for love

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents as 22-year-old Ukrainian refugee Mariia enters the studio. programme.desc: Jamie Oliver travels to south Wales, where he learns about how late-19th-century coal boom has continued to influence British food culture to this day. He samples classic Italian home cooking, and visits a mosque and community centre in Tiger Bay. Inspired by his experiences, he cooks a 12-hour rabbit bolognese and lamb lollipops with dips and toasted crunchy nuts

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig introduce a special round of the baking challenge in which contestants must create confectionery inspired by the Roaring Twenties. The signature challenge involves a decorative twist on custard pies, while the technical round will be a test of the bakers timing and consistency. Finally, for the Shows, they must create a three-tiered masterpiece inspired by their tipple of choice. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quiz in which contestants are given their prize money before they have answered a question, and must race against time to keep hold of it. Once the money is gone, the contestant is out - and only one can make the final to play for the amount they have managed to save

Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: Highlander III: The Final Dimension (1994)
programme.desc: Immortal Connor MacLeod has hung up his sword and settled down to family life, but the sudden reappearance of his arch-enemy Kane compels him to take up arms once more. Fantasy sequel, starring Christopher Lambert, Mario Van Peebles and Deborah Kara Unger

programme.title: Drive Hard (2014)
programme.desc: A bank robber finds himself in need of a getaway driver for his latest heist. When he comes across a former racing champion working as a driving instructor, he books a lesson on the day of the robbery, then forces the hapless teacher to help him escape the police. Action thriller, starring John Cusack and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Sniper: Special Ops (2016)
programme.desc: An elite military force is sent on a rescue mission which proves successful, but one of the soldiers is left behind when he goes to help a wounded man. The leader of the squad is forbidden from going back for him, but disobeys orders to lead his men on a desperate rescue mission. Action thriller, starring Steven Seagal and Tim Abell

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors treat a young woman who has been thrown from a horse, which then trampled on her, and also a woman who was hit by a car while riding her motorbike on a dual carriageway. An 11-year-old boy is brought into hospital after running into a wall at school and hurting his wrist

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams are called out to help Dennis, whos suffering a heart attack. A spin on her bike has catastrophic consequences for Carolyn. Plus, theres a dramatic night-time car crash in Norfolk

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Aaron, 31, is rushed to St Georges after overturning his car onto metal railings during a high-speed collision. He has a serious laceration to his face where a spiked railing narrowly missed his eye socket. Cameras also follow Fiona, 65, who is rushed to the hospital after falling over in a restaurant and cutting her knee during her friend Evelyns 70th birthday party

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Niki, 34, is airlifted to St Georges after crashing into another rider during a charity bike ride between London and Brighton. While staff try to contact Nikis wife Phill, who is almost 300 miles away at their home in the north east of England, 90-year-old Peter is rushed to AandE with severe blood poisoning

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. In Israel, Kate unearths the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery. In Iceland, Jimmy investigates Skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product, and in Cornwall, Matt dives for edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit landed gent Sir Benjamin Slade as they search for more upcycling prospects. Simon converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry refurbishes a club fender fire surround and turns a quick profit on a Fordson tractor

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition starts in Filey, North Yorkshire, at The White Lodge Hotel, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of luxury and high standards will impress their guests. During an afternoon at the lifeboat station, Kerry and Nicola from Camp Katur reveal their competitive nature. At dinner, there are differences of opinions between the guests. James and Kim find some home truths in their feedback,but insist they wont lower themselves to tit for tat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Amanda Lucia-Charley and her friend Alan Talbot invite the other hoteliers to sample the delights of Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool, where Alan introduces his alter-ego Ada

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub BandB will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique geodomes and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lees decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at the Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, Hampshire, where owner Jacqui Castle and her sidekick Jane Waters hope the homely approach will win the day. Guests Martin and Catherine Crosswaite are not encouraged by the shared facilities, while breakfast served at a communal table is not to the liking of Norman Butcher and Lorraine Watkins

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Baths the Rising Sun Inn, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher hope to bring their guests up to standard by having a dress code. Following their feedback on the last visit, Jacqui and Jane take an extra critical eye to the rooms, while Martin and Catherine show their competitive streak during a boules match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Busfeild Arms in East Morton for the third day of the contest, where hosts Martin and Catherine Croswaite pride themselves in giving great Yorkshire hospitality. Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. Meanwhile, Martin shocks the group by sharing his stunt motorbike riding past, and later, Patrick feels the pressure of being the final host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggans Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epsteins father. Jacqui and Jane are unimpressed by unpleasant smells in the bedroom, while Martin and Catherine show they will do anything to win during a game of Fab Four charades. At dinner, Patrick shocks his guests when he reveals his idea of the ideal woman. Will it have an effect on their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Jacqui and Jane from the Oak Tree Cottage want to find out why Norman and Lorraine wouldnt return, while Martin and Catherine from the Busfeild Arms have some explaining to do when it comes to their profit margins. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits Devon to meet single mother Michelle, who has moved back to Exmouth and wants a place she and her son Dan can call home. After many failed offers, Michelle feels stuck in her small rented apartment that was only ever meant to be temporary. Its the lowest stock levels Kirsties ever seen, meaning good luck and property prowess are required in equal measure if shes to find that needle in a haystack for Michelle

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp catches up with Julie and Allen in Stoke, a couple who appeared on the show in 2019, to see if they followed through with their decision. Julie and Allen could not agree on any of the many houses they had viewed together, so they turned to Kirstie and Phil to help end their decade-long debate - should they sell their home or stay put and renovate?

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: The train travels through the Balkans and reaches its final stop in Sofia, the capital of Bulgaria before ending its journey in Istanbul

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Will is concerned about potential spinal and head injuries when 63-year-old Valerie is rushed to St Georges after falling from a horse, while 30-year-old Natasha has had an accident while trampolining at her son Taelans eighth birthday party

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Long-distance lorry driver Neil, 52, has fallen backwards off a ramp onto a concrete floor and is sent for an urgent CT scan, the results of which are a shock. Also receiving treatments are 29-year-old Ben, who has dislocated his shoulder in a cycling accident, and Wendy, 73, who is in resus with a severe open ankle fracture after falling at home

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Steph is trapped with multiple injuries after a bad smash near Alnwick in Northumberland. An accident with a bonfire leaves Paul with serious burns, while in Norfolks Thetford Forest its difficult for the medics to reach horse-rider Alice, who has badly broken her ankle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Will is concerned about potential spinal and head injuries when 63-year-old Valerie is rushed to St Georges after falling from a horse, while 30-year-old Natasha has had an accident while trampolining at her son Taelans eighth birthday party

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors treat a young woman who has been thrown from a horse, which then trampled on her, and also a woman who was hit by a car while riding her motorbike on a dual carriageway. An 11-year-old boy is brought into hospital after running into a wall at school and hurting his wrist

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. Kate heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato and finds herself slap bang in the middle of the worlds biggest food fight. Jimmy visits Italy to investigate the difference between risotto rice and long grain. Matt finds out why pork scratchings arent made from British pigs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Henry Cole visit a motorbike fan, making table lamps from engines and turning a pallet and iron wheels into a stylish modern coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head east to Newark in search of their latest upcycling prospects. Simon finds an antique European threshing board, which he turns into a coffee table, and Henrys all at sea with a ships porthole

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Bridge Hotel in Scunthorpe, owned by Martin and Hannah Weaver. However, visitors Rob and Michelle from Seashells BandB find a condom by the entrance and Clare and Fran from The New Court Hotel are concerned about cleanliness. Tom and Samara from The Crown at Whitchurch think the rooms are little more than functional. Martin and Hannah try to impress their guests at breakfast by introducing them to their pet pig, but there are issues with eggs, but some harsh feedback disappoints the pair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Seashells BandB in Sutton-on-Sea, where owners Michelle and Rob Earp hope their simple residence with an animal twist will win the day. Given Michelle and Rob criticised the Bridge Hotel, Martin and Hannah give their room a thorough going over and find all manner of issues. The self-service breakfast buffet receives some tough criticism in the morning, and Rob and Michelle are angry about their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Crown at Whitchurch in Herefordshire, where ex-army man Tom Jones runs the pub BandB with his step-daughter Samara Cohen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the New Court Hotel in Usk, managed by Clare Davies, who faces complaints include peppery eggs and missing mushrooms at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: WWII: Operation Barbarossa
programme.desc: Part one of two. Nazi Germanys invasion of the Soviet Union. Launched in June 1941, it was one of the largest military offensives in history, involving millions of Axis soldiers and marking a significant turning-point in the Second World War. The invasion was a surprise to the Soviets, despite significant troop build-up at the border. In the first hours of the attack, bombs rained down on Soviet airfields

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: The story of how William IIIs plans to knock down Hampton Court were scuppered when he became caught up in an expensive nine-year war with Louis XIV of France. A battle of wills and words starts veering off in directions he never anticipated - with his wife, his co-presenter, his agent and his producer all in the room. Douglas is in the spotlight and out of his depth. When his daughter Claudia turns up, the confrontation flies out of control and long-buried truths begin to surface. Comedy drama, starring Hugh Bonneville and Karen Gillan

programme.title: Room to Improve

However, their wish list is far more ambitious than their budget. Undeterred, the couple hold firm on a fourth-bedroom extension - complete with a TV wall, where Dermot is picturing elegant French doors

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: The Jessops visit Rachel and Robins father in Malta on the holiday of a lifetime. The only thing is, they all have different agendas for the vacation - Amy wants to paint the town red, Robin wants to try scuba diving, Paul wants to visit every historical monument in the guidebook, Cherry wants to chill by the pool, and Rachel wants to address some long-standing grievances with her dad via the medium of lengthy and intense conversations about her feelings. It seems unlikely that everyones going to get what they want from the holiday - especially given that the swimming pool is out of order

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels though Cumbria, setting sail in a small craft on Lake Windermere with a lifelong devotee of Arthur Ransomes childrens books Swallows and Amazons. At Barrow-in-Furness, Michael investigates the mountains of scrap left behind as iron ore was turned into ships, trains and railway tracks, and discovers researchers are exploring how slagbanks could contribute to reducing atmospheric carbon dioxide.

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part one of two. A sniper strikes terror into the hearts of the residents of Baltimore. Gritty police drama, guest starring chat show host Jay Leno

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Egans wife is killed and his son is taken into protective custody, while Bayliss and Pembleton continue their investigation in New York. Police drama, starring Kyle Secor

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part two of two. Kellerman returns from a family wedding to investigate a murder

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Risky Business (1983)
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen OSullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J OConnor

programme.title: Innerspace (1987)
programme.desc: A Navy test pilot is shrunk in a ground-breaking scientific experiment, but instead of being injected into a laboratory rabbit, the tiny specimen accidentally winds up inside a hypochondriac supermarket worker. As he tries to find a way out, criminals come after the unlikely duo in search of the secret of the miniaturising technology. Sci-fi comedy, starring Dennis Quaid, Martin Short, Meg Ryan, Kevin McCarthy, Fiona Lewis and Vernon Wells

programme.title: The Last Starfighter (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager breaks the world record for a video game depicting spaceship battles, unaware the game is based on a real interplanetary war and has been created as a test to recruit fighter pilots. When a besieged planets entire fleet is wiped out, he is forced to take on an entire alien armada single-handed. Sci-fi adventure, starring Lance Guest and Robert Preston

programme.title: Batteries Not Included (1987)
programme.desc: A family of tiny alien spacecraft intervenes to help the residents of a run-down Manhattan brownstone tenement stop greedy developers from demolishing their homes. However, the miniature flying saucers have the odds stacked against them as they bravely do all they can to save the day. Sci-fi fantasy, starring Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Frank McRae and Elizabeth Pena.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager at a new school befriends a pretty girl, but her ex-boyfriend is jealous and attacks him. During one particularly bad fight, a wise old caretaker intervenes and defeats the youngsters assailants using his martial arts skills. He goes on to mentor the boy and teach him karate so he can face his enemies in a tournament. Drama, with Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Elisabeth Shue

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II (1986)
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagis is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemys own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his bosss empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielbergs Second World War drama based on JG Ballards semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Escape to Victory (1981)
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment (1985)
programme.desc: Americas most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Escape to Victory (1981)
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielbergs Second World War drama based on JG Ballards semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket (1987)
programme.desc: Raw recruits undergo harsh training under a domineering Marine drill sergeant after being called up for service in the Vietnam War, but his brutal methods lead to the breakdown of one of his cadets. Eventually, some of the fully trained soldiers get their first taste of combat in 1968. Stanley Kubricks drama, starring Matthew Modine, Adam Baldwin, Vincent DOnofrio and R Lee Ermey

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick OConnor and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment (1985)
programme.desc: Americas most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Dont Lets Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her familys Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Henry VIIIs law against witches in 1542 led to thousands of women being persecuted and many burned at the stake. New investigative techniques and historical records are to re-examine the fates of women accused of witchcraft during 16th and 17th-century witch trials in Essex. Rylan and Alice Roberts explores the events, lives, and alleged crimes of those accused, often bringing the stories to life through scripted drama and featuring expert testimony from historians and psychologists

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: St Osyth, a village near Brightlingsea in Essex, was home to 14 women who were put on trial for witchcraft, some of whom were duly convicted according to the law of the time. Rylan and Alice Roberts investigate the 1582 St Osyth witch hunt, where a petty disagreement over money spiralled into mass hysteria and death

programme.title: Witches of Essex

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough investigates the life of Jumbo, a famous Victorian elephant, supposedly the largest that ever lived. Jumbo arrived at London Zoo in 1865 and was popular with the royal family, but was dangerously unhappy in captivity. In later life, he would be sold to PT Barnums circus, becoming a celebrity before dying under mysterious circumstances. Attenborough examines Jumbos remains and considers the lives of elephants in the wild to learn more about the animals difficult life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: A web of relationships rules all life on earth, and all species are interconnected. but while some relationships are one-sided, others are mutually beneficial

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. This documentary uses the latest camera technology to show their manoeuvres, mating strategies, territorial behaviour and flight dynamics, revealing them to be the ultimate insect

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: The Vredefort Dome in South Africa, which was created by a meteorite collision two billion years ago and provides a unique natural haven

programme.title: Extreme Africa
programme.desc: Etosha, a once-great lake which dried up and now only fills with the summer rains, attracting all manner of water birds including flamingos

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Documentary following a young male brown bear on his adventures in a mountain range that forms a natural border between Slovenia and Austria

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: A look at how plankton, the smallest of creatures, underpins the oceans food chain, meaning that without it, marine life as it is known would cease to exist

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: In the heart of the Zambian bush lurks one of the last remaining strongholds for some of Africas most endangered large carnivores

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of king penguins, filmed on the sub-Antarctic island of South Georgia over five months. The programme imagines what one penguins life would be, following it during the challenging, awkward time between adolescence and adulthood. Presented by David Attenborough

programme.title: Attenborough at 100: Behind the Lens
programme.desc: As David Attenborough turns 100, this intimate film presents new interviews, behind-the-scenes footage and extraordinary clips

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough investigates the life of Jumbo, a famous Victorian elephant, supposedly the largest that ever lived. Jumbo arrived at London Zoo in 1865 and was popular with the royal family, but was dangerously unhappy in captivity. In later life, he would be sold to PT Barnums circus, becoming a celebrity before dying under mysterious circumstances. Attenborough examines Jumbos remains and considers the lives of elephants in the wild to learn more about the animals difficult life

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the ways different creatures hear and produce sound and how it can influence their decisions, using cutting-edge audio technology to reveal a new perspective and understanding of animal behaviour

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough shares the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk and more use to find a mate - and warn off the competition

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A look at how baby animals communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the early days of life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his two-part exploration of the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years by looking at the history of mammals. He traces their journey from humble origins as tiny nocturnal forest-dwellers to their astonishing explosion in diversity and domination of the world following the death of the dinosaurs

programme.title: Flying Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the world of the pterosaur, a flying creature that occupied the skies 200 million years ago. Visiting sites around the world, from the Dorset coast to New Mexico, he explains how the reptiles evolved to defy the forces of gravity, and examines the features of their anatomy that can still be seen in present-day descendents. He also discovers why they became extinct after dominating the skies for millions of years

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: The broadcaster invites viewers to join him as he takes an after-hours stroll around one of his favourite places, the Natural History Museum. But this is no ordinary tour as some of the many exhibits spring to life as the veteran naturalist strolls along

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: Documentary capturing some of the greatest filming sequences of David Attenboroughs career, using previously unseen footage, from the deepest dives in a submersible on the Great Barrier Reef to watching a million bats take off in a cave in Borneo. Other highlights include life in the frozen tundra of South Georgia, a colony of King Penguins and the worlds largest migration of Hammerhead sharks in the Galapagos Islands

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

The project is a surprise for a landscape gardener who was diagnosed with Alzheimers at the age of just 32, making him one of the youngest people in the country to develop the condition and leaving him physically unable to complete the garden personally. programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh prepares a surprise for Rob and Margaret Isdale, a Grantham couple in their seventies who have fostered more than 150 children over the past 45 years. Alan draws inspiration from Frances Hodgson Burnetts novel The Secret Garden, creating ancient looking follies and winding paths, and even turning a normal garden shed into a mock-Tudor feature

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: Two new travellers make a big impression when they join the group. A morning of port tasting leads to some loose lips and, following a trip to circus school, things get heated

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Carnarvon along with their staff turn the castle into a winter wonderland with their biggest-ever tree in the grand saloon and a festive cocktail masterclass hosted by butler Louis. Lady Carnarvon carves out some family time away from the public as she gathers loved ones around the tree for a festive get together

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave Wellman prepares to repair and replaster a bedroom ceiling in a family home

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Worcestershire, widening access to a couples property by building a concrete platform and new gateway

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Mark Evans meets more people who aspire to live in their ultimate waterside dream home. Simon and Mary Sparrow live on a barge in Beccles, Suffolk, with their son Nate and their two cats. The Sparrows have been running a boatyard for nearly 10 years, specialising in refurbishing and renting out floating homes to holidaymakers. Now theyre designing and building a new, one-of-a-kind floating home for themselves - a futuristic-looking floating pod, drawing on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: It is the end of the first week on the coach, and tour guide Brendan has a twist up his sleeve for tonights vote. An argument during a rowing race leaves one couple in jeopardy

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh prepares a surprise for Rob and Margaret Isdale, a Grantham couple in their seventies who have fostered more than 150 children over the past 45 years. Alan draws inspiration from Frances Hodgson Burnetts novel The Secret Garden, creating ancient looking follies and winding paths, and even turning a normal garden shed into a mock-Tudor feature

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Lee Burkhill and Chris Hull head to Runcorn, Cheshire, where they meet two Craigs. Each has different ideas about what they want from their bland back garden. One wants a stylish, contemporary space with clean lines and the other wishes to fill the garden with wildlife. Lee and Chris set about creating the perfect garden that pleases both on a £5,000 budget

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull are in Yateley, Hampshire, where they try to turn Julia and Angelas garden filled with builders clutter into a Crete-inspired paradise complete with blue and white hues, pergola, lush greenery, sun-drenched corners and olive trees with a budget of just £6,000

programme.title: Au Pair Girls (1972)
programme.desc: A group of foreign girls travel to England to work as au pairs, but they are easily distracted from their new jobs by the men they meet. Comedy, starring Gabrielle Drake, Astrid Frank and Johnny Briggs

programme.title: Sex and the Other Woman (1972)
programme.desc: Anthology of five comic tales of married men having affairs. A henpecked husband risks getting caught in the act, an accountants wife discovers her husband is sleeping with a colleague, a scheming seductress tries to break up her lovers marriage, a man has a relationship with his daughters schoolfriend, and a deceived wife gets a tip-off from a nosy neighbour. Comedy, starring Bartlett Mullins and Maggie Wright

programme.title: Girl on a Motorcycle (1968)
programme.desc: A bored housewife leaves her husband and hits the open road to seek satisfaction in the arms of a former lover. Drama, starring Marianne Faithfull and Alain Delon

programme.desc: A father and daughter go after their neighbour for a 911 call alleging mental instability, trespassing and a police report.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A father says he paid extra support to prevent his daughter from being homeless; he sues the mother of his child after she allegedly turns the girl against him.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A mother and daughter admit that they have had fights in the past, but go after their landlord for an allegedly illegal lockout and destruction of property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man accidentally steps on a womans 12-year-old Pomeranian; she claims he was drunk and devoid of empathy.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.desc: A man is accused of repeatedly kicking his girlfriends car after she allegedly sees a message from another girl on his phone.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man accuses the mother of his child of purposely sabotaging a planned visitation with his daughter and sues her for travel expenses.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: The Judge lays down the law when a defendant allegedly scams more than one person with his promises to find vehicles for them to purchase.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After a woman allegedly attacks a friend with a pair of scissors, she countersues for alleged threats, slander and cyberbullying.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: When over $8,000 worth of appliances goes missing, a solid eye witness may seal the fate of a contractor in question.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A marine fights off a Pit Bull by all means necessary when the animal attacks his dog; their neighbour claims he walked right past their Bad Ass Dog on Duty sign.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man gives his paralegal permission to deduct a $700 filing fee from his business account only to discover months later that over $30K has gone missing.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A golf cart driver in a senior gated community claims a motorist blew a stop sign and caused a crash; she says he was the one driving recklessly.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man claims his ex-lover threatened and harassed him; his car was allegedly damaged in an attempt to escape gunfire.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A mans new rental property is burned to the ground in a California forest fire; he is sued by his previous landlord for eviction fees.
