programme.title: UK Crime Files: Kidnap and Murder of an Heiress
programme.desc: Jackie Malton examines the 1969 kidnap and murder of Muriel McKay in Wimbledon, mistaken for Rupert Murdochs wife, with two brothers convicted.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murdered For Love
programme.desc: A look at the case of Paul Gault, whose body was discovered. Northern Ireland police began to uncover the facts behind what seemed like a random attack.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: In 2022, Kenneth Ford was found murdered in his Birmingham home. DI Michelle Thurgood used witness statements combined with CCTV analysis to track down Gary ONeill.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: The story of Torquay businessman Martin Marty Fenton, who fell out with the owner of the local casino, John Tsigarides. He exacted his revenge with a murderous shooting spree.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: The case of Kylie Dembrey from Berkshire, who fell for Mark Sinclair, unaware his charm hid a violent abuser. She kept the years of abuse secret, until he tragically murdered her.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murder Against All Odds
programme.desc: Former Scotland Yard detective Jackie Malton is back on the beat in Newport, digging out the case file on a murder that sent shockwaves through the city in 1992.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murdered For Love
programme.desc: A look at the case of Paul Gault, whose body was discovered. Northern Ireland police began to uncover the facts behind what seemed like a random attack.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: The story of Torquay businessman Martin Marty Fenton, who fell out with the owner of the local casino, John Tsigarides. He exacted his revenge with a murderous shooting spree.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: The case of Kylie Dembrey from Berkshire, who fell for Mark Sinclair, unaware his charm hid a violent abuser. She kept the years of abuse secret, until he tragically murdered her.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of a couple who became lost in a blizzard while hiking in Scotland. Plus, a mum shares how she was saved by the quick thinking of her young daughters when she collapsed.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A plantation owner ends up dead during a seance - although with the door firmly closed at the time and all the participants holding hands round the table, who did the deed? The victims family are convinced it was the work of a ghost said to haunt the plantation, but Humphrey is determined to find a more rational explanation. Meanwhile, Fidel has moved on, leaving Officer Dwayne Myers holding the fort - and while he is struggling to cope, the last thing he needs is the Commissioner stepping in to help. Crime drama, with guest appearances from Holby Citys Don Gilet and former Corrie bad girl Natalie Gumede

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: When Sarahs former professor is seemingly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime

programme.desc: Murdoch moves into a rooming house where a quirky fellow tenant insists that the detective helps investigate an apparent murder in the building

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Jane finds a new adversary in cult leader Bret Stiles, who arouses suspicion when a media mogul who may have questioned his groups activities is found dead. As the team searches for clues, the victims father receives an anonymous text message warning that a bomb is about to detonate in the building. Crime drama, guest starring Malcolm McDowell (A Clockwork Orange)

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with one thing in common - the victim was convinced they were all her family

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A hotel maid accused of killing a guest tells the detectives that she was fighting off an attacker who was trying to rape her. Carrie takes the on the case in a bid to find out the truth of it. However at the same time, it could be troublesome for the matter Al is investigating, as a series of intricately connected blackmail schemes is revealed. Poppy Montgomey stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team dives into the case of surf-school owner Jake Peters murder. The victim was shot in his workshop and Humphrey suspects there is more to the incident than meets the eye when he spots the door was locked from the inside with no other obvious means of entry. Suspicion falls on three pupils who have their own agendas, while grieving wife Katie and best friend Karl Slater are harbouring dark secrets. Away from the workplace, Humphrey continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille and decides to take matters into his own hands when faced with competition for her affections. Caribbean-set detective drama, with guest appearances from Hetti Bywater, Claire Goose and Will Mellor

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dads surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.desc: Mrs McCarthys friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A mathematical genius is shot dead and found with his index finger removed. The agents discover he was working on a code-breaking device that could make it possible to hack into any computer - but after finishing it had refused to pass the instrument over to the buyer. When Jane learns another whizz kid knows the whereabouts of the tool, he faces a race against time to stop it falling into the wrong hands. Crime drama, guest starring Lucy Davis (The Office) and Fisher Stevens (Lost)

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The investigation of a stockbrokers murder is cut short when a gas-leak explosion tears through the crime scene, forcing Al and Carrie to flee. While visiting the imprisoned founders of a charity linked to the victim, Carrie is shocked when her remarkable memory places one of them at the blast, leading to the discovery of a money-laundering scheme and the kidnap of a seven-year-old girl

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Heritage Society is re-enacting the French invasion of the island when its president dies. At first it looks like an extreme reaction to a dodgy stew as the rest of the group have fallen ill - but when lab reports reveal there was poison in the pot, Humphrey is left wondering why the victim was the only one to end up in the mortuary. Meanwhile, Dwayne takes Humphrey out on the town to show him his own way of celebrating the founding of Saint Marie, and the DI continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring David Bamber and Tyger Drew-Honey

Crime drama, guest starring Lucy Davis (The Office) and Fisher Stevens (Lost)

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthys friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The investigation of a stockbrokers murder is cut short when a gas-leak explosion tears through the crime scene, forcing Al and Carrie to flee. While visiting the imprisoned founders of a charity linked to the victim, Carrie is shocked when her remarkable memory places one of them at the blast, leading to the discovery of a money-laundering scheme and the kidnap of a seven-year-old girl

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Heritage Society is re-enacting the French invasion of the island when its president dies. At first it looks like an extreme reaction to a dodgy stew as the rest of the group have fallen ill - but when lab reports reveal there was poison in the pot, Humphrey is left wondering why the victim was the only one to end up in the mortuary. Meanwhile, Dwayne takes Humphrey out on the town to show him his own way of celebrating the founding of Saint Marie, and the DI continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring David Bamber and Tyger Drew-Honey

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dads surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A manhunt for two dangerous brothers, whose crimes left long-term scars on a community and a legacy of mistrust for the police, reveals regrets that still haunt Vince

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthys friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest and his friends find themselves stranded with a group of hedonists and are desperate to escape, fearful that their lives are in danger. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams as a Roman Catholic priest who attempts to solve various misdemeanours

programme.title: Hudson and Rex

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdochs investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team heads to Harvey Estuary in Western Australia to try and recover a 36-foot plywood vessel called Endeavour II that sunk in a wild storm. What appears to be a straightforward job on paper turns into an absolute nightmare. Job two is a charitable cause close to Lukes hear, as he and Jacinta team-up with mens mental health charity Squared Away to try and rescue a historic boat that is about to sink

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef witnesses a fishing method frozen in time, where the use of engines and winches is banned, and goes fishing under sail for what he considers to be the best oysters in the world. Back on dry land, Rick cooks a warming fish soup called Cullen Skink, and discovers the all-but-forgotten story of Cornwalls ancient capital, Lostwithiel

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits a deer farm near Bodmin Moor run by Pip and Matt Smith, before returning to the kitchen in Padstow to make a simple venison Wellington. Later, he spends an afternoon on Porthgwarra beach with the artist Hannah Woodman, whose work is inspired by the sea-worn landscape of west Cornwall, before defining the Cornish sense of humour over a pint with comedian Jonny Cowling

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Strictly judge Bruno Tonioli, Newsnight presenter Kirsty Wark and comedians Adam Buxton and Rob Beckett are this weeks guests

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers head for Wales, where they meet three women who demonstrate their most impressive dishes, preparing Maltese stuffed marrow, an elaborate cheesecake, and an orchid gateaux. programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick delves into the stories of those who worked in Cornwalls mines, from the men who laboured beneath the earths surface to the young women who earned their living breaking rocks with heavy sledgehammers. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness set out to qualify as lorry drivers, before embarking on a stormy HGV road trip across Britain, and a spot of truck racing. Out on the track, Chris runs the rule over the beautiful new Lotus Emira

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers head for East Anglia, where they meet three women who provide examples of meals that have become family favourites. The pair also visit the coast to prepare sausage and bean casserole and jam roly-poly with custard, and a recipe fair highlights more home-cooked classics, including trifle, fruit cake and macaroni cheese

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef travels to the far west of Cornwall to meet a potter whose work captures the rugged beauty of her surroundings. Then to the far east, on the trail of the poet Charles Causley, who spent his life in the Cornish border town of Launceston. There, Rick meets another Cornish writer, Patrick Gale, who has written a book on Causleys life, and considers him this countrys greatest Second World War poet. Rick also whips up his favourite seabass dish

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef visits the fishing port of Boscastle and finds a seafood restaurant in a building which once housed rockets used to fire safety ropes out to sinking ships. A trip to Cornwalls only dedicated organic mushroom farm inspires him to cook a stir fry with lions mane mushrooms, which it is said can regrow neurons. Rick also discovers a reason so many Germans love Cornwall

programme.desc: Angela Barnes, Ed Gamble, London Hughes, Rhys James and Milton Jones join regular panellist Hugh Dennis on the comedy quiz show, hosted by Dara O Briain. Yet again, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on each other

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert, Ignacio Lopez and Zoe Lyons join regular panellist Alan Davies on the comedy quiz, with host Sandi Toksvig asking questions on the theme of viral

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian returns with the programme in which he tries to make sense of the modern world. Frankie tackles the biggest issues troubling the planet, making a string of bold and often outrageous statements which he then picks apart with the help of a variety of celebrity guests

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade confronts the horror of cooking and dining out as he attempts to create his very own utopian eatery, consulting leading food scientists and checking out gadgets more at home in a laboratory than a kitchen. He invites guest Adrian Edmondson to join him at his unique bistro, complete with printed food, robot waiters, computerised wine sniffers, zero-calorie electronic starters, levitating desserts and transparent coffee

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Cocaine is found hidden inside the wall of a refrigerated truck, and a Honduran immigrant fleeing gang violence applies for asylum in the US

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A shipment of meth disguised as concrete is intercepted, and officers interview a Haitian immigrant who has crossed nine countries on foot to reach America

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team heads to the seaside town of Rockingham in Western Australia to try and salvage a 34-foot yacht called the Renee Louise

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick delves into the stories of those who worked in Cornwalls mines, from the men who laboured beneath the earths surface to the young women who earned their living breaking rocks with heavy sledgehammers. He also visits a maker of botanical spirits, and adds a cheeky nip to his clementine trifle

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three lightweight supercars across Europe in search of the continents best roads, and Jeremy looks at Volkswagens decision to put a Bentley engine in the Golf. Helen Mirren is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness set out to qualify as lorry drivers, before embarking on a stormy HGV road trip across Britain, and a spot of truck racing. Out on the track, Chris runs the rule over the beautiful new Lotus Emira

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers head for East Anglia, where they meet three women who provide examples of meals that have become family favourites. programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef travels to the far west of Cornwall to meet a potter whose work captures the rugged beauty of her surroundings. Then to the far east, on the trail of the poet Charles Causley, who spent his life in the Cornish border town of Launceston. There, Rick meets another Cornish writer, Patrick Gale, who has written a book on Causleys life, and considers him this countrys greatest Second World War poet. Rick also whips up his favourite seabass dish

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef visits the fishing port of Boscastle and finds a seafood restaurant in a building which once housed rockets used to fire safety ropes out to sinking ships. A trip to Cornwalls only dedicated organic mushroom farm inspires him to cook a stir fry with lions mane mushrooms, which it is said can regrow neurons. Rick also discovers a reason so many Germans love Cornwall

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Rimmer tries desperately to earn a commission and qualify for transfer from Red Dwarf to an advanced holoship containing the cream of the Space Corps, and a woman he has developed feelings for. Starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Rimmer is taken prisoner on a planet where the inhabitants and landscape are created by his own mind and is subjected to a series of gruesome tortures devised by his imagination, leaving the rest of the crew to come up with a way to rescue him. programme.desc: Now that Hetty and her husband are back from their trip to Australia, the Wainthropp Detective Agency can get back to some serious sleuthing. Patricia Routledge stars as the modern-day Miss Marple, with Derek Benfield, Dominic Monaghan and Lesley Dunlop

programme.desc: Crime drama set in the 1930s. Surrealist artists, including Rene Magritte and Salvador Dali, gather for an exhibition. When a murder occurs, the estate is locked down

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: A body is pulled out of the river near Harrys local pub, and something about the dead man feels familiar to the sleuth. Harry and Ferguss investigation takes in the house of the grieving widow, a Polish restaurant, a boarding school and a greyhound track as they seek to uncover the sinister truth. Crime drama, starring Jane Seymour

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A rock n roll star dies in an alleyway after performing at a concert in Ballarat, leaving the doctor to investigate the mysterious circumstances of his death - and see past his tumultuous personal life to find the truth

Detective drama, starring Patricia Routledge

programme.desc: Tracey is torn between duty to her husband and love for her sister and has to decide whether blood is thicker than water. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.sub-title: The Empire That Foggy Nearly Built
programme.desc: After witnessing an argument between two motorists over an available space, Foggy hits on another get-rich-quick scheme - this time in the form of a car-parking scheme. Rural comedy, starring Brian Wilde, Peter Sallis and Bill Owen

programme.sub-title: The Last Surviving Maurice Chevalier Impression
programme.desc: Compo decides the way to win the heart of Nora Batty is to become a celebrity, so goes on a televised talent show. Gorden Kaye (Allo Allo!) guest stars, alongside Bill Owen, Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy tries to defy his age by entering the annual barrel-rolling competition, and undergoes a gruelling training programme. Meanwhile, Pearl buys Howard a tropical fish tank as a gift. Long-running rural comedy, starring Brian Wilde and Juliette Kaplan

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clergyman uncovers secrets, hypocrisy and murder at a finishing school for young ladies. Mystery, starring Mark Williams

Elsewhere, Daryl takes action when he is confronted by the three lads who have been bullying him. Crime drama, starring Sarah Lancashire and James Norton

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Retired DI Frank Patterson presents the team with information regarding the getaway car used in a 30-year-old safety deposit-box robbery. They discover the former detective not only wants to convict the suspected thief of the heist and murder of his three colleagues, but also prove that a high-ranking officer was involved in the plot - jeopardising the future of Sandras Ucos unit. Phil Daniels guest stars

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: The unlikely crime-fighting duo investigate the murder of a Sikh woman whose death has unleashed simmering racial tensions in the town, but as corruption and political intrigue erupt around them, they find that love can thrive against all the odds

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra reopens an investigation into the suspected suicide of a Foreign Office diplomat, whose body was found in a frozen London lake after she had suffered the personal tragedy of a miscarriage and the professional embarrassment of having a government laptop stolen from her home. The womans fiance and twin sister both believe her death is connected to sensitive information held on the missing computer and blame her boss for her downfall - and when Sandra clashes with the man himself, it only makes her more determined to pursue the conspiracy theory, despite Stricklands advice to tread carefully. programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Acclaimed chronicle of the Second World War, beginning with an account of Hitlers ascent to power at a time when the Germans were stricken by humiliating military defeat, runaway inflation and economic depression. The Nazi leaders promises of regained national pride and prosperity struck a chord with millions of ordinary citizens, and he was elected on a tidal wave of popular support. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The months following prime minister Neville Chamberlains declaration of war against Germany, in which the only casualties on the home front were those who had to endure the blackouts. Elsewhere in Europe, the Nazi war machine cut a swathe of destruction. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How, in 1940, the French Army suffered a heavy defeat after underestimating the Nazis strength while relying on First World War strategies and equipment to defend its frontiers. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The drop in morale of Churchills forces following the fall of France to Nazi forces during the Second World War, and how the Dunkirk evacuation and the Battle of Britain helped to restore British confidence. Plus, Americas reasons for initially refusing to enter the conflict

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels the length of California. He climbs to the top of one of the worlds tallest trees, and meets the fire crews tasked with tackling the ever-present danger of wildfires, a growing threat given the states changing climate and chronic shortage of water. He also meets street doctors providing much-needed medical support to people living in extreme poverty and visits a city on the desert for Americans who have dropped out of the rat race entirely

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels from Texas to southern Mexico, meeting a woman who risks her life to take supplies to migrants stranded on the Mexican side of the border in Reynosa, one of the countrys most violent cities, which is dominated by a powerful criminal organisation. He also ventures into the rainforest to explore the Maya city of Yaxchilan, and meets the modern-day descendants of this civilisation, who are increasingly marginalised and treated as second-class citizens

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across Central America, from the Caribbean to the Pacific. Along the way, he goes diving on a coral reef on the coast of Belize, and witnesses a gun battle between park rangers and intruders in Chiquibul National Park. He also discovers how climate change has left Guatemala devastated by famine and drought, reports on measures to curb gang violence in El Salvador, and learns how Costa Rica aims to become the worlds first carbon neutral country by 2021

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister yearns for intelligent conversation with people he actually likes, but with only Rimmer for company, he is forced to take desperate action - sitting the chefs exam. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Norman Lovett

programme.title: Red Dwarf

programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of admiring Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his immaculate 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Jowett Javelin and Escort Barn Find
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a Bradford-built 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Paul and Dave uncover a Ford Escort thats been untouched for 30 years

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewsons customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his late fathers treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and large collection of tractors, but extracting them from old barns on a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Mini Cooper and Chevy Pick Up
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business. Featured vehicles include a Mini Cooper and Chevrolet Pick-up truck

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson explores Parkgate on the estuary of the River Dee, Cheshire. The village is landlocked due to the estuarys shifting silt, but 250 years ago it was a bustling harbour

Craig Charles and Chris Barrie star

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is looking forward to a lazy weekend when his dad turns up on the doorstep, looking for somewhere to stay having just come out of hospital - and in need of someone to care for him. Bobby Ball guest stars, with Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A wealthy new couple move into the block and soon find out that sharing a building with Lee and Lucy is anything but straightforward. The fun begins when Lee somehow manages to bag an invitation to a christening party being thrown by the couple - sending him and Lucy on a last-minute gift-buying trip, during which they make every wrong decision humanly possible to find the perfect present for the baby who seems to have everything. Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden join the cast, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin discovers his house is built over the route of a disused public footpath and decides to reopen it to the public. Originally broadcast in 1987

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Things are not going well between Lin and Joan and the news that Alma will be leaving for a six-month tour looks like it might push Lin over the edge. When the social worker visits, Lin snaps and disappears, leaving Alma fearing that her mum may have turned back to her old ways

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Robin has an epiphany that has a far-reaching impact on the rest of the ghosts, who each struggle to believe his prediction. Alison suggests a spontaneous night out with Mike, but on trying to get the old gang together find only Obi and his new girlfriend Brenda are available. Despite Alisons best efforts, the evening doesnt quite meet expectations and the couple are left pondering how much their lives are changing

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: After listening to Emmets piano playing from her garden, stopping a passer-by to listen with her and rebuking Liz for collecting milk in her dressing gown, Hyacinth receives a phone call from Mrs Fortescue asking for a lift into town

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Hilda sees Ann climbing over Pauls garden fence and thinks they are having an affair. Comedy, starring Richard Briers. First shown in 1987

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to sell a huge wheel of cheese which is long past its sell by date. Leroy gets sick of delivering goods by bicycle and demands his father invest in a van - and Gastric is on hand to sell them a suitable vehicle. Mrs Featherstone makes some frightening suggestions to Mr Newbold about taking their relationship further

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene allows Boycie to buy a maximum of six cows for the farm - and is less than impressed when Elgin, Jed and Bryan turn up with a herd of 300. The vet is called out when Rocky the bull fails to take any notice of the females, and Tyler prepares to sit a local private schools entrance exam. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Young Mr Grace opens a social club for his employees, and they decide to decorate it in their own inimitable style. John Inman, Mollie Sugden, and Trevor Bannister star

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene allows Boycie to buy a maximum of six cows for the farm - and is less than impressed when Elgin, Jed and Bryan turn up with a herd of 300. The vet is called out when Rocky the bull fails to take any notice of the females, and Tyler prepares to sit a local private schools entrance exam. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: Mainwaring and his platoon are put in charge of manning an observation post on a derelict pier, but they are marooned when their boat drifts away. Warden Hodges spots their signal light and rows out to tell them to switch it off, but his boat sinks and he is stranded with them. Comedy first broadcast in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe and Bill Pertwee

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: The Mystical Boudoir of Nurse Gladys Emmanuel
programme.desc: Arkwright hatches a plan to get into Nurse Gladyss bedroom by forcing a reluctant Granville to masquerade as a burglar, so the miserly shopkeeper can come to her rescue. Ronnie Barker and Lynda Baron star

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys decides Arkwright needs a lesson in politeness, and convinces him a writer for the Good Shop Guide is doing the rounds. She then poses as the critic to see for herself the unusual sight of the miserly shopkeeper being nice to his customers. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright feels neglected by Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, and decides to feign an illness in an attempt to get her undivided attention, but she soon sees through the ruse

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Robin has an epiphany that has a far-reaching impact on the rest of the ghosts, who each struggle to believe his prediction. Alison suggests a spontaneous night out with Mike, but on trying to get the old gang together find only Obi and his new girlfriend Brenda are available. Despite Alisons best efforts, the evening doesnt quite meet expectations and the couple are left pondering how much their lives are changing

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Hilda sees Ann climbing over Pauls garden fence and thinks they are having an affair. Comedy, starring Richard Briers. First shown in 1987

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison receive a life-changing offer beyond their wildest dreams. Still reeling from the news, and anxious to discuss it, they are interrupted by a heartbroken Obi, who has been suddenly dumped by a strangely callous Brenda. Alison and Mike agree to reconvene with lists of pros and cons. At first, Obis romantic woes find a sympathetic ear in eternally lovelorn Thomas, but even he tires of Obis self-pity. Meanwhile Alison must fend off the Ghosts, desperate to sway her decision

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.desc: Granville invests in a giant balloon for advertising purposes, but the promotion does not goes as planned. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy accidentally runs over a pet rabbit belonging to the daughter of an important client, so she needs someone to help cover her tracks. Unfortunately, the best people she has are Lee and Daisy. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Tim becomes part of a band at work and Lucy falls for the lead guitarist. In a fit of jealousy, Lee decides to follow his best friends example and try his hand at the rock n roll lifestyle. Comedy, starring Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Lee Mack

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy seems reluctant to reveal any information about her new boyfriend, Mark refuses to talk about why his wife has thrown him out, and Dermot lies to his fiancees parents about his job - all of which makes Agnes feel her family is becoming too secretive. Comedy, written by and starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville organises a cut-price sale - but only as a means to get rid of old stock - while Nurse Gladys is reunited with a former patient. Romance is in the air in the neighbourhood, as Mrs Featherstone has her eye on a new arrival while Mavis tries to reignite Granvilles passion over a cup of coffee

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma bags herself a talent agent and lands an acting role that turns out to be completely demoralising. Meanwhile, Lin is back in hospital and has discovered a penchant for witchcraft, while Almas best mate Leanne has transformed a truck into a bar thats become Boltons biggest hot-spot. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner and Mikes mum Betty is staying - and testing Mike and Alisons patience with her interfering ways. Theres no easy way to ask her to go home so the couple - and the ghosts - struggle on, with Button House feeling fuller than ever. Now a convert, Robin is missing that all-important Christmassy feeling, so the gang members share their secrets to getting into the festive spirit - but when even more decorations and merry music dont do the trick, the ghosts wonder if Robin will be able to capture that Christmas magic again

programme.desc: Hyacinth decides that she and husband Richard should have a weekend at a golfing hotel so that she can keep up with the Major and his wife. Roy Clarkes suburban sitcom, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: Captain Mainwaring enlists an unusual recruit to the platoon - a tracker dog provided by Walker. Vintage comedy, starring Arthur Lowe, John Le Mesurier and Clive Dunn. First shown in 1969

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville invests in a giant balloon for advertising purposes, but the promotion does not goes as planned. He also has to come up with the best sales pitch he can muster to persuade his customers to buy tins of smoked oysters. Leroy comes under pressure from Beth to find a suitable man for Ruby

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright feels neglected by Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, and decides to feign an illness in an attempt to get her undivided attention, but she soon sees through the ruse

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy accidentally runs over a pet rabbit belonging to the daughter of an important client, so she needs someone to help cover her tracks. Unfortunately, the best people she has are Lee and Daisy. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Tim becomes part of a band at work and Lucy falls for the lead guitarist. In a fit of jealousy, Lee decides to follow his best friends example and try his hand at the rock n roll lifestyle. Comedy, starring Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Lee Mack

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy seems reluctant to reveal any information about her new boyfriend, Mark refuses to talk about why his wife has thrown him out, and Dermot lies to his fiancees parents about his job - all of which makes Agnes feel her family is becoming too secretive. Comedy, written by and starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright feels neglected by Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, and decides to feign an illness in an attempt to get her undivided attention, but she soon sees through the ruse

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: An Errand Boy by the Ear
programme.desc: Arkwright decides Granville needs toughening up and starts dragging him around the store by his ear, but the regular customers are unhappy by what they see

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: Comedy sketches with the popular funnyman, featuring Kevin and Perry, Wayne and Waynetta Slob and the Self-Righteous Brothers. With special guests Desmond Lynam, Jimmy Hill and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin takes on the bureaucracy of office politics when he discovers his work space has been cut in half. Comedy, starring Richard Briers

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison receive a life-changing offer beyond their wildest dreams. Still reeling from the news, and anxious to discuss it, they are interrupted by a heartbroken Obi, who has been suddenly dumped by a strangely callous Brenda. Alison and Mike agree to reconvene with lists of pros and cons. At first, Obis romantic woes find a sympathetic ear in eternally lovelorn Thomas, but even he tires of Obis self-pity. Meanwhile Alison must fend off the Ghosts, desperate to sway her decision

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma bags herself a talent agent and lands an acting role that turns out to be completely demoralising. Meanwhile, Lin is back in hospital and has discovered a penchant for witchcraft, while Almas best mate Leanne has transformed a truck into a bar thats become Boltons biggest hot-spot. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner and Mikes mum Betty is staying - and testing Mike and Alisons patience with her interfering ways. Theres no easy way to ask her to go home so the couple - and the ghosts - struggle on, with Button House feeling fuller than ever. Now a convert, Robin is missing that all-important Christmassy feeling, so the gang members share their secrets to getting into the festive spirit - but when even more decorations and merry music dont do the trick, the ghosts wonder if Robin will be able to capture that Christmas magic again

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary sells one of Dorothys records when Tony identifies it as a valuable collectors item - but struggles to find a replacement when she asks where it has gone

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Journalist and TV personality Piers Morgan continues his travels across the USA, this time meeting two very different female murderers, both of whom killed someone they loved. First, he heads to Floridas largest female prison to visit Amanda Hutto, who is serving a life sentence for murdering her daughter. She was accused of deliberately dunking her seven-year-old child as a punishment for being naughty, with her young son testifying against her at the murder trial. Next, he journeys to Texas, where he encounters Rhonda Glover, a former beauty queen and rodeo star who gunned down her lover in cold blood after their relationship spiralled into drug-fuelled obsession and paranoia

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Journalist and broadcaster Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of Americas most notorious female killers in a quest to discover what drives women to kill. He travels to Gatesville, Texas, to visit Erin Caffey, who masterminded the murder of her entire family at the age of 16, and will remain behind bars until she is almost 60. Piers finds out what made a typical teenager conspire with her boyfriend to kill her mum, dad, and two younger brothers, before meeting the only survivor of the tragedy, Erins father Terry

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey and her team help Cherelle and Tony Dowling transform their chaotic two-bedroom home through a radical space-saving reorganisation. With a lost engagement ring somewhere in the house and all their time taken up with tidying away the toys of their four children under four, the clutter is causing chaos. Carpenter Iwan Carrington gives the home a supersized spring clean, Robert Bent radically reconfigures the bedrooms to create maximum space, while Dilly Carter reveals the best way to sort out kids rooms and kitchen cupboards

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Canadian comedian, actor and writer, Katherine Ryan, for a frank and honest conversation about her career, relationships and the changing shape of her family. Louis accompanies Katherine as she performs her latest stand-up tour, Missus, in Southend-On-Sea, and later, he spends a rare day off with Katherine, her daughter Violet and her husband Bobby

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps rehabilitate a group of ex-racing greyhounds who have never experienced life beyond the racetrack

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Basildon, Essex, to meet nine-year-old Brandon, who suffers a severe form of epilepsy and can have up to 30 seizures a day. He requires 24-hour care and mum Jenny cant let him out of her sight for a moment - and to make matters worse, the family home simply isnt safe enough for the youngster. Luckily, the local tradesmen have heard of the familys plight and arrive in force to help Nick and the team transform the home, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Swansea to meet 15-year-old Jack, who suffers from a rare form of muscular dystrophy that has led to a lifetime of painful operations. His mother Helen and older brother Daniel do all they can to help but as he grows it has become impossible to get him upstairs and now he has to sleep in the living room, leaving the rest of the family with nowhere to socialise. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their three-bedroom semi, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats a Labrador suffering with severe arthritis in its elbow, and suggests using stem cells to help with the inflammation, while one of the teams senior neurologists deals with a Chihuahua born with fluid on the brain. Plus, a man comes all the way from France with his Labrador cross, which requires high-end surgery for elbow dysplasia

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Great Dane comes to the clinic needing an operation on its spine, but when Noel Fitzpatrick discovers the dog has laryngeal paralysis, the prospect of surgery suddenly becomes much more complicated. There are also two Labradors in for treatment. One needs a knee replacement, while the other has a leg tumour that may require amputation. But there may be bad news

programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildons Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Billericay as Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows. Gavin feels uncomfortable about Gwen and Bryn knowing the details of his sex life, and Dave hears about the shocking events of the curry night. Meanwhile, Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship when he makes a staggering suggestion

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Bank Holiday Monday sees the Essex contingent arrive for a sunny day at the beach in Barry. Gavin has a heart-to-heart with his dad, which gives him much to think about, while a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden and Ruth Jones star

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Broadcaster and journalist Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of Americas most notorious female murderers, in a quest to discover what drives a woman to kill. He travels to Lowell Correctional Institute in Florida to talk to Rebecca Fenton, convicted for the murder of her husband Larry, who was shot dead in their home. He also looks into the details of the case, learning how for several years it seemed she was going to get away with the crime, until the involvement of the FBI helped bring her to justice

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Having once run an organised home, Kirsty Lespeare suffered an accident that left her with limited mobility, meaning she struggles to keep on top of day-to-day chores. She, partner Taurean and their four children want Stacey, and team members Dilly Carter, Iwan Carrington and Robert Bent to find storage solutions for their rented home, that wont damage the property and will help give Kirsty her independence back. There are emotional moments as Kirsty tries to let go of clothes that hold memories from before the accident, and Taurean starts to face the part hes played in the build-up of the clutter

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Louis spends time with the global pop star Rita Ora. Louis meets Rita at her dads pub in West London where they sit down for a revealing conversation that takes in her rise to stardom, her familys arrival in the UK in 1990, and the difficulties she has faced dealing with intense press scrutiny and speculation about her personal life. Later, Louis spends time with Rita on the set of her latest music video in LA, before joining her as she puts on a spectacular live performance in Albania

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, whos been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his fathers footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nicks experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles comes to the aid of Liz and Jason Liversidge, a Hull couple in desperate need of help in future-proofing their family home. Not long after getting married and starting a family, Jason was diagnosed with both Fabrys disease, which causes a build-up of poisonous toxins in the body, and Motor Neurone Disease, which drastically reduced his life expectancy. The pair also discovered that Jason would have passed Fabrys disease on to his two daughters, which means that once her husband is gone, Liz will need all the help she can get in managing her childrens condition. Nick joins forces with designer Oliver Heath and an army of volunteers to put together a home in which Jason can build meaningful memories with his girls, but one which also gives Liz the best chance of providing for their future needs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Loughborough to meet a family of five, whose identical twin babies have been diagnosed as having a form of dwarfism, while at the age of 41, dad Mark is recovering from aggressive bowel and liver cancer. Now they are struggling for space. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their home, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Micha and Crispins beloved Bengal cat Loki has been hit by a car, while Faberge, an elderly Chinese crested dog with a fabulous wardrobe, is brought in by owners Julie and Suzanne after suffering seizures. Noel Fitzpatrick and the team also meet a deerhound called Willow, who has broken her neck, and with a high-risk operation to consider, her owners must decide whether to proceed

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick enters new territory when he is called upon to help a Humboldt penguin chick. Wall-e is from Longleat Safari Park in Wiltshire and needs an operation to cure his unhappy foot. He also treats a three-legged Maine Coon cat that needs help with a mysterious swelling in its back leg and a husky from Thailand undergoes hip surgery

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets Lurcher Terri, whos terrified of the world and must learn to trust again, and helps settle a family of chihuahuas given up by their heartbroken owner

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and the Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Patsy Palmer and Gargy Patel guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Gingers for Justice take to the skyline in a rooftop demonstration

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Paul OGrady guest stars, as Nan puts in a characteristically foul-mouthed appearance on his teatime chat show, broadcasting her horrible views to the nation. With Brian Murphy and Neil Stuke

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Preparations for Nessa and Daves wedding are in full swing, Stacey has life-changing news for Gavin, and Bryn and Jason put their big secret to bed once and for all. Finally, the wedding arrives and, as Nessa prepares to make her way to the church, Smithy takes the opportunity to have one last chat. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon star

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Retired electrician Wayne Bradshaw is a car boot sale enthusiast. His craft-loving wife Sue emotionally reveals that her son Alex is too embarrassed to bring people home to the clutter. Stacey gathers up all their possessions, leading to Sue and Wayne struggling to let go of over 30 years worth of stuff. Carpenter Rob breathes new life into the familys home by rejigging the kitchen layout and upcycling old but much-loved items. Iwan gives the home a supersized spring clean and organizer Dilly shows the best way to sort out wardrobes

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Bigger Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy meets the Mulvey-Sydneys in Ennis in County Clare, where he and his team adapt their home to suit the needs of 13-year-old Isabella, who has a rare congenital disorder

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats a Labrador suffering with severe arthritis in its elbow, and suggests using stem cells to help with the inflammation, while one of the teams senior neurologists deals with a Chihuahua born with fluid on the brain. Plus, a man comes all the way from France with his Labrador cross, which requires high-end surgery for elbow dysplasia

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Great Dane comes to the clinic needing an operation on its spine, but when Noel Fitzpatrick discovers the dog has laryngeal paralysis, the prospect of surgery suddenly becomes much more complicated. There are also two Labradors in for treatment. One needs a knee replacement, while the other has a leg tumour that may require amputation. But there may be bad news

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Basildon, Essex, to meet nine-year-old Brandon, who suffers a severe form of epilepsy and can have up to 30 seizures a day. He requires 24-hour care and mum Jenny cant let him out of her sight for a moment - and to make matters worse, the family home simply isnt safe enough for the youngster. Luckily, the local tradesmen have heard of the familys plight and arrive in force to help Nick and the team transform the home, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Swansea to meet 15-year-old Jack, who suffers from a rare form of muscular dystrophy that has led to a lifetime of painful operations. His mother Helen and older brother Daniel do all they can to help but as he grows it has become impossible to get him upstairs and now he has to sleep in the living room, leaving the rest of the family with nowhere to socialise. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their three-bedroom semi, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildons Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Basildon, Essex, to meet nine-year-old Brandon, who suffers a severe form of epilepsy and can have up to 30 seizures a day. He requires 24-hour care and mum Jenny cant let him out of her sight for a moment - and to make matters worse, the family home simply isnt safe enough for the youngster. Luckily, the local tradesmen have heard of the familys plight and arrive in force to help Nick and the team transform the home, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Journalist and TV personality Piers Morgan continues his travels across the USA, this time meeting two very different female murderers, both of whom killed someone they loved. First, he heads to Floridas largest female prison to visit Amanda Hutto, who is serving a life sentence for murdering her daughter. She was accused of deliberately dunking her seven-year-old child as a punishment for being naughty, with her young son testifying against her at the murder trial. Next, he journeys to Texas, where he encounters Rhonda Glover, a former beauty queen and rodeo star who gunned down her lover in cold blood after their relationship spiralled into drug-fuelled obsession and paranoia

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Preparations for Nessa and Daves wedding are in full swing, Stacey has life-changing news for Gavin, and Bryn and Jason put their big secret to bed once and for all. Finally, the wedding arrives and, as Nessa prepares to make her way to the church, Smithy takes the opportunity to have one last chat. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon star

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Having once run an organised home, Kirsty Lespeare suffered an accident that left her with limited mobility, meaning she struggles to keep on top of day-to-day chores. She, partner Taurean and their four children want Stacey, and team members Dilly Carter, Iwan Carrington and Robert Bent to find storage solutions for their rented home, that wont damage the property and will help give Kirsty her independence back. There are emotional moments as Kirsty tries to let go of clothes that hold memories from before the accident, and Taurean starts to face the part hes played in the build-up of the clutter

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Louis spends time with the global pop star Rita Ora. Louis meets Rita at her dads pub in West London where they sit down for a revealing conversation that takes in her rise to stardom, her familys arrival in the UK in 1990, and the difficulties she has faced dealing with intense press scrutiny and speculation about her personal life. Later, Louis spends time with Rita on the set of her latest music video in LA, before joining her as she puts on a spectacular live performance in Albania

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, whos been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his fathers footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nicks experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles comes to the aid of Liz and Jason Liversidge, a Hull couple in desperate need of help in future-proofing their family home. Not long after getting married and starting a family, Jason was diagnosed with both Fabrys disease, which causes a build-up of poisonous toxins in the body, and Motor Neurone Disease, which drastically reduced his life expectancy. The pair also discovered that Jason would have passed Fabrys disease on to his two daughters, which means that once her husband is gone, Liz will need all the help she can get in managing her childrens condition. Nick joins forces with designer Oliver Heath and an army of volunteers to put together a home in which Jason can build meaningful memories with his girls, but one which also gives Liz the best chance of providing for their future needs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Loughborough to meet a family of five, whose identical twin babies have been diagnosed as having a form of dwarfism, while at the age of 41, dad Mark is recovering from aggressive bowel and liver cancer. Now they are struggling for space. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their home, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Micha and Crispins beloved Bengal cat Loki has been hit by a car, while Faberge, an elderly Chinese crested dog with a fabulous wardrobe, is brought in by owners Julie and Suzanne after suffering seizures. Noel Fitzpatrick and the team also meet a deerhound called Willow, who has broken her neck, and with a high-risk operation to consider, her owners must decide whether to proceed

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick enters new territory when he is called upon to help a Humboldt penguin chick. Wall-e is from Longleat Safari Park in Wiltshire and needs an operation to cure his unhappy foot. He also treats a three-legged Maine Coon cat that needs help with a mysterious swelling in its back leg and a husky from Thailand undergoes hip surgery
